inputFields.name: expireTime
inputFields.description: Optional. Timestamp in UTC of when this SandboxEnvironment is considered expired. This is *always* provided on output, regardless of what `expiration` was sent on input.

inputFields.name: ttl
inputFields.description: Optional. Input only. The TTL for the sandbox environment. The expiration time is computed: now + TTL.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description: Identifier. The name of the SandboxEnvironment.

inputFields.name: displayName
inputFields.description: Required. The display name of the SandboxEnvironment.

inputFields.name: createTime
inputFields.description: Output only. The timestamp when this SandboxEnvironment was created.

inputFields.name: updateTime
inputFields.description: Output only. The timestamp when this SandboxEnvironment was most recently updated.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1SandboxEnvironmentSpec_Input
types.description: The specification of a SandboxEnvironment.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1SandboxEnvironmentSpecCodeExecutionEnvironment_Input
types.description: The code execution environment with customized settings.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1SandboxEnvironmentConnectionInfo_Input
types.description: The connection information of the SandboxEnvironment.

inputFields.name: loadBalancerIp
inputFields.description: Output only. The IP address of the load balancer.

inputFields.name: loadBalancerHostname
inputFields.description: Output only. The hostname of the load balancer.

inputFields.name: sandboxInternalIp
inputFields.description: Output only. The internal IP address of the SandboxEnvironment.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1Session_Input
types.description: A session contains a set of actions between users and Vertex agents.

inputFields.name: expireTime
inputFields.description: Optional. Timestamp of when this session is considered expired. This is *always* provided on output, regardless of what was sent on input. The minimum value is 24 hours from the time of creation.

inputFields.name: ttl
inputFields.description: Optional. Input only. The TTL for this session. The minimum value is 24 hours.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description: Identifier. The resource name of the session. Format: 'projects/{project}/locations/{location}/reasoningEngines/{reasoning_engine}/sessions/{session}'.

inputFields.name: createTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Timestamp when the session was created.

inputFields.name: updateTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Timestamp when the session was updated.

inputFields.name: displayName
inputFields.description: Optional. The display name of the session.

inputFields.name: labels
inputFields.description: The labels with user-defined metadata to organize your Sessions. Label keys and values can be no longer than 64 characters (Unicode codepoints), can only contain lowercase letters, numeric characters, underscores and dashes. International characters are allowed. See https://goo.gl/xmQnxf for more information and examples of labels.

inputFields.name: sessionState
inputFields.description: Optional. Session specific memory which stores key conversation points.

inputFields.name: userId
inputFields.description: Required. Immutable. String id provided by the user

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1SessionEvent_Input
types.description: An event represents a message from either the user or agent.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description: Identifier. The resource name of the event. Format:`projects/{project}/locations/{location}/reasoningEngines/{reasoning_engine}/sessions/{session}/events/{event}`.

inputFields.name: author
inputFields.description: Required. The name of the agent that sent the event, or user.

inputFields.name: invocationId
inputFields.description: Required. The invocation id of the event, multiple events can have the same invocation id.

inputFields.name: timestamp
inputFields.description: Required. Timestamp when the event was created on client side.

inputFields.name: errorCode
inputFields.description: Optional. Error code if the response is an error. Code varies by model.

inputFields.name: errorMessage
inputFields.description: Optional. Error message if the response is an error.

inputFields.name: rawEvent
inputFields.description: Optional. Weakly typed raw event data in proto struct format.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1EventActions_Input
types.description: Actions are parts of events that are executed by the agent.

inputFields.name: skipSummarization
inputFields.description: Optional. If true, it won't call model to summarize function response. Only used for function_response event.

inputFields.name: stateDelta
inputFields.description: Optional. Indicates that the event is updating the state with the given delta.

inputFields.name: artifactDelta
inputFields.description: Optional. Indicates that the event is updating an artifact. key is the filename, value is the version.

inputFields.name: escalate
inputFields.description: Optional. The agent is escalating to a higher level agent.

inputFields.name: requestedAuthConfigs
inputFields.description: Optional. Will only be set by a tool response indicating tool request euc. Struct key is the function call id since one function call response (from model) could correspond to multiple function calls. Struct value is the required auth config, which can be another struct.

inputFields.name: transferAgent
inputFields.description: Optional. If set, the event transfers to the specified agent.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1EventMetadata_Input
types.description: Metadata relating to a LLM response event.

inputFields.name: partial
inputFields.description: Optional. Indicates whether the text content is part of a unfinished text stream. Only used for streaming mode and when the content is plain text.

inputFields.name: turnComplete
inputFields.description: Optional. Indicates whether the response from the model is complete. Only used for streaming mode.

inputFields.name: interrupted
inputFields.description: Optional. Flag indicating that LLM was interrupted when generating the content. Usually it's due to user interruption during a bidi streaming.

inputFields.name: longRunningToolIds
inputFields.description: Optional. Set of ids of the long running function calls. Agent client will know from this field about which function call is long running. Only valid for function call event.

inputFields.name: branch
inputFields.description: Optional. The branch of the event. The format is like agent_1.agent_2.agent_3, where agent_1 is the parent of agent_2, and agent_2 is the parent of agent_3. Branch is used when multiple child agents shouldn't see their siblings' conversation history.

inputFields.name: customMetadata
inputFields.description: The custom metadata of the LlmResponse.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1GroundingMetadata_Input
types.description: Information about the sources that support the content of a response. When grounding is enabled, the model returns citations for claims in the response. This object contains the retrieved sources.

inputFields.name: webSearchQueries
inputFields.description: Optional. The web search queries that were used to generate the content. This field is populated only when the grounding source is Google Search.

inputFields.name: imageSearchQueries
inputFields.description: Optional. The image search queries that were used to generate the content. This field is populated only when the grounding source is Google Search with the Image Search search_type enabled.

inputFields.name: groundingChunks
inputFields.description: A list of supporting references retrieved from the grounding source. This field is populated when the grounding source is Google Search, Vertex AI Search, or Google Maps.

inputFields.name: groundingSupports
inputFields.description: Optional. A list of grounding supports that connect the generated content to the grounding chunks. This field is populated when the grounding source is Google Search or Vertex AI Search.

inputFields.name: googleMapsWidgetContextToken
inputFields.description: Optional. Output only. A token that can be used to render a Google Maps widget with the contextual data. This field is populated only when the grounding source is Google Maps.

inputFields.name: sourceFlaggingUris
inputFields.description: Optional. Output only. A list of URIs that can be used to flag a place or review for inappropriate content. This field is populated only when the grounding source is Google Maps.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1SearchEntryPoint_Input
types.description: An entry point for displaying Google Search results. A `SearchEntryPoint` is populated when the grounding source for a model's response is Google Search. It provides information that you can use to display the search results in your application.

inputFields.name: renderedContent
inputFields.description: Optional. An HTML snippet that can be embedded in a web page or an application's webview. This snippet displays a search result, including the title, URL, and a brief description of the search result.

inputFields.name: sdkBlob
inputFields.description: Optional. A base64-encoded JSON object that contains a list of search queries and their corresponding search URLs. This information can be used to build a custom search UI.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1GroundingChunk_Input
types.description: A piece of evidence that supports a claim made by the model. This is used to show a citation for a claim made by the model. When grounding is enabled, the model returns a `GroundingChunk` that contains a reference to the source of the information.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1GroundingChunkWeb_Input
types.description: A `Web` chunk is a piece of evidence that comes from a web page. It contains the URI of the web page, the title of the page, and the domain of the page. This is used to provide the user with a link to the source of the information.

inputFields.name: uri
inputFields.description: The URI of the web page that contains the evidence.

inputFields.name: title
inputFields.description: The title of the web page that contains the evidence.

inputFields.name: domain
inputFields.description: The domain of the web page that contains the evidence. This can be used to filter out low-quality sources.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1GroundingChunkImage_Input
types.description: An `Image` chunk is a piece of evidence that comes from an image search result. It contains the URI of the image search result and the URI of the image. This is used to provide the user with a link to the source of the information.

inputFields.name: sourceUri
inputFields.description: The URI of the image search result page.

inputFields.name: imageUri
inputFields.description: The URI of the image.

inputFields.name: title
inputFields.description: The title of the image search result page.

inputFields.name: domain
inputFields.description: The domain of the image search result page.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1GroundingChunkRetrievedContext_Input
types.description: Context retrieved from a data source to ground the model's response. This is used when a retrieval tool fetches information from a user-provided corpus or a public dataset.

inputFields.name: uri
inputFields.description: The URI of the retrieved data source.

inputFields.name: title
inputFields.description: The title of the retrieved data source.

inputFields.name: text
inputFields.description: The content of the retrieved data source.

inputFields.name: documentName
inputFields.description: Output only. The full resource name of the referenced Vertex AI Search document. This is used to identify the specific document that was retrieved. The format is `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/collections/{collection}/dataStores/{data_store}/branches/{branch}/documents/{document}`.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1GroundingChunkMaps_Input
types.description: A `Maps` chunk is a piece of evidence that comes from Google Maps, containing information about places or routes. This is used to provide the user with rich, location-based information.

inputFields.name: uri
inputFields.description: The URI of the place.

inputFields.name: title
inputFields.description: The title of the place.

inputFields.name: text
inputFields.description: The text of the place answer.

inputFields.name: placeId
inputFields.description: This Place's resource name, in `places/{place_id}` format. This can be used to look up the place in the Google Maps API.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1GroundingChunkMapsPlaceAnswerSources_Input
types.description: The sources that were used to generate the place answer. This includes review snippets and photos that were used to generate the answer, as well as URIs to flag content.

inputFields.name: reviewSnippets
inputFields.description: Snippets of reviews that were used to generate the answer.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1GroundingChunkMapsPlaceAnswerSourcesReviewSnippet_Input
types.description: A review snippet that is used to generate the answer.

inputFields.name: reviewId
inputFields.description: The ID of the review that is being referenced.

inputFields.name: googleMapsUri
inputFields.description: A link to show the review on Google Maps.

inputFields.name: title
inputFields.description: The title of the review.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1GroundingChunkMapsRoute_Input
types.description: Route information from Google Maps.

inputFields.name: distanceMeters
inputFields.description: The total distance of the route, in meters.

inputFields.name: duration
inputFields.description: The total duration of the route.

inputFields.name: encodedPolyline
inputFields.description: An encoded polyline of the route. See https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/utilities/polylinealgorithm

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1GroundingSupport_Input
types.description: A collection of supporting references for a segment or part of the model's response.

inputFields.name: groundingChunkIndices
inputFields.description: A list of indices into the `grounding_chunks` field of the `GroundingMetadata` message. These indices specify which grounding chunks support the claim made in the content segment. For example, if this field has the values `[1, 3]`, it means that `grounding_chunks[1]` and `grounding_chunks[3]` are the sources for the claim in the content segment.

inputFields.name: confidenceScores
inputFields.description: The confidence scores for the support references. This list is parallel to the `grounding_chunk_indices` list. A score is a value between 0.0 and 1.0, with a higher score indicating a higher confidence that the reference supports the claim. For Gemini 2.0 and before, this list has the same size as `grounding_chunk_indices`. For Gemini 2.5 and later, this list is empty and should be ignored.

inputFields.name: renderedParts
inputFields.description: Indices into the `rendered_parts` field of the `GroundingMetadata` message. These indices specify which rendered parts are associated with this support message.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1Segment_Input
types.description: A segment of the content.

inputFields.name: partIndex
inputFields.description: Output only. The index of the `Part` object that this segment belongs to. This is useful for associating the segment with a specific part of the content.

inputFields.name: startIndex
inputFields.description: Output only. The start index of the segment in the `Part`, measured in bytes. This marks the beginning of the segment and is inclusive, meaning the byte at this index is the first byte of the segment.

inputFields.name: endIndex
inputFields.description: Output only. The end index of the segment in the `Part`, measured in bytes. This marks the end of the segment and is exclusive, meaning the segment includes content up to, but not including, the byte at this index.

inputFields.name: text
inputFields.description: Output only. The text of the segment.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1RetrievalMetadata_Input
types.description: Metadata related to the retrieval grounding source. This is part of the `GroundingMetadata` returned when grounding is enabled.

inputFields.name: googleSearchDynamicRetrievalScore
inputFields.description: Optional. A score indicating how likely it is that a Google Search query could help answer the prompt. The score is in the range of `[0, 1]`. A score of 1 means the model is confident that a search will be helpful, and 0 means it is not. This score is populated only when Google Search grounding and dynamic retrieval are enabled. The score is used to determine whether to trigger a search.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1GroundingMetadataSourceFlaggingUri_Input
types.description: A URI that can be used to flag a place or review for inappropriate content. This is populated only when the grounding source is Google Maps.

inputFields.name: sourceId
inputFields.description: The ID of the place or review.

inputFields.name: flagContentUri
inputFields.description: The URI that can be used to flag the content.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1Transcription_Input
types.description: Audio transcription in Server Content.

inputFields.name: text
inputFields.description: Optional. Transcription text.

inputFields.name: finished
inputFields.description: Optional. The bool indicates the end of the transcription.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1CreateDeploymentResourcePoolRequest_Input
types.description: Request message for CreateDeploymentResourcePool method.

inputFields.name: deploymentResourcePoolId
inputFields.description: Required. The ID to use for the DeploymentResourcePool, which will become the final component of the DeploymentResourcePool's resource name. The maximum length is 63 characters, and valid characters are `/^[a-z]([a-z0-9-]{0,61}[a-z0-9])?$/`.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1DeploymentResourcePool_Input
types.description: A description of resources that can be shared by multiple DeployedModels, whose underlying specification consists of a DedicatedResources.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description: Immutable. The resource name of the DeploymentResourcePool. Format: `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/deploymentResourcePools/{deployment_resource_pool}`

inputFields.name: serviceAccount
inputFields.description: The service account that the DeploymentResourcePool's container(s) run as. Specify the email address of the service account. If this service account is not specified, the container(s) run as a service account that doesn't have access to the resource project. Users deploying the Models to this DeploymentResourcePool must have the `iam.serviceAccounts.actAs` permission on this service account.

inputFields.name: disableContainerLogging
inputFields.description: If the DeploymentResourcePool is deployed with custom-trained Models or AutoML Tabular Models, the container(s) of the DeploymentResourcePool will send `stderr` and `stdout` streams to Cloud Logging by default. Please note that the logs incur cost, which are subject to [Cloud Logging pricing](https://cloud.google.com/logging/pricing). User can disable container logging by setting this flag to true.

inputFields.name: createTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Timestamp when this DeploymentResourcePool was created.

inputFields.name: satisfiesPzs
inputFields.description: Output only. Reserved for future use.

inputFields.name: satisfiesPzi
inputFields.description: Output only. Reserved for future use.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1Endpoint_Input
types.description: Models are deployed into it, and afterwards Endpoint is called to obtain predictions and explanations.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description: Identifier. The resource name of the Endpoint.

inputFields.name: displayName
inputFields.description: Required. The display name of the Endpoint. The name can be up to 128 characters long and can consist of any UTF-8 characters.

inputFields.name: description
inputFields.description: The description of the Endpoint.

inputFields.name: deployedModels
inputFields.description: Output only. The models deployed in this Endpoint. To add or remove DeployedModels use EndpointService.DeployModel and EndpointService.UndeployModel respectively.

inputFields.name: trafficSplit
inputFields.description: A map from a DeployedModel's ID to the percentage of this Endpoint's traffic that should be forwarded to that DeployedModel. If a DeployedModel's ID is not listed in this map, then it receives no traffic. The traffic percentage values must add up to 100, or map must be empty if the Endpoint is to not accept any traffic at a moment.

inputFields.name: etag
inputFields.description: Used to perform consistent read-modify-write updates. If not set, a blind "overwrite" update happens.

inputFields.name: labels
inputFields.description: The labels with user-defined metadata to organize your Endpoints. Label keys and values can be no longer than 64 characters (Unicode codepoints), can only contain lowercase letters, numeric characters, underscores and dashes. International characters are allowed. See https://goo.gl/xmQnxf for more information and examples of labels.

inputFields.name: createTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Timestamp when this Endpoint was created.

inputFields.name: updateTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Timestamp when this Endpoint was last updated.

inputFields.name: network
inputFields.description: Optional. The full name of the Google Compute Engine [network](https://cloud.google.com//compute/docs/networks-and-firewalls#networks) to which the Endpoint should be peered. Private services access must already be configured for the network. If left unspecified, the Endpoint is not peered with any network. Only one of the fields, network or enable_private_service_connect, can be set. [Format](https://cloud.google.com/compute/docs/reference/rest/v1/networks/insert): `projects/{project}/global/networks/{network}`. Where `{project}` is a project number, as in `12345`, and `{network}` is network name.

inputFields.name: enablePrivateServiceConnect
inputFields.description: Deprecated: If true, expose the Endpoint via private service connect. Only one of the fields, network or enable_private_service_connect, can be set.

inputFields.name: modelDeploymentMonitoringJob
inputFields.description: Output only. Resource name of the Model Monitoring job associated with this Endpoint if monitoring is enabled by JobService.CreateModelDeploymentMonitoringJob. Format: `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/modelDeploymentMonitoringJobs/{model_deployment_monitoring_job}`

inputFields.name: dedicatedEndpointEnabled
inputFields.description: If true, the endpoint will be exposed through a dedicated DNS [Endpoint.dedicated_endpoint_dns]. Your request to the dedicated DNS will be isolated from other users' traffic and will have better performance and reliability. Note: Once you enabled dedicated endpoint, you won't be able to send request to the shared DNS {region}-aiplatform.googleapis.com. The limitation will be removed soon.

inputFields.name: dedicatedEndpointDns
inputFields.description: Output only. DNS of the dedicated endpoint. Will only be populated if dedicated_endpoint_enabled is true. Depending on the features enabled, uid might be a random number or a string. For example, if fast_tryout is enabled, uid will be fasttryout. Format: `https://{endpoint_id}.{region}-{uid}.prediction.vertexai.goog`.

inputFields.name: satisfiesPzs
inputFields.description: Output only. Reserved for future use.

inputFields.name: satisfiesPzi
inputFields.description: Output only. Reserved for future use.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1DeployedModel_Input
types.description: A deployment of a Model. Endpoints contain one or more DeployedModels.

inputFields.name: sharedResources
inputFields.description: The resource name of the shared DeploymentResourcePool to deploy on. Format: `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/deploymentResourcePools/{deployment_resource_pool}`

inputFields.name: id
inputFields.description: Immutable. The ID of the DeployedModel. If not provided upon deployment, Vertex AI will generate a value for this ID. This value should be 1-10 characters, and valid characters are `/[0-9]/`.

inputFields.name: model
inputFields.description: The resource name of the Model that this is the deployment of. Note that the Model may be in a different location than the DeployedModel's Endpoint. The resource name may contain version id or version alias to specify the version. Example: `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/models/{model}@2` or `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/models/{model}@golden` if no version is specified, the default version will be deployed.

inputFields.name: gdcConnectedModel
inputFields.description: GDC pretrained / Gemini model name. The model name is a plain model name, e.g. gemini-1.5-flash-002.

inputFields.name: modelVersionId
inputFields.description: Output only. The version ID of the model that is deployed.

inputFields.name: displayName
inputFields.description: The display name of the DeployedModel. If not provided upon creation, the Model's display_name is used.

inputFields.name: createTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Timestamp when the DeployedModel was created.

inputFields.name: disableExplanations
inputFields.description: If true, deploy the model without explainable feature, regardless the existence of Model.explanation_spec or explanation_spec.

inputFields.name: serviceAccount
inputFields.description: The service account that the DeployedModel's container runs as. Specify the email address of the service account. If this service account is not specified, the container runs as a service account that doesn't have access to the resource project. Users deploying the Model must have the `iam.serviceAccounts.actAs` permission on this service account.

inputFields.name: disableContainerLogging
inputFields.description: For custom-trained Models and AutoML Tabular Models, the container of the DeployedModel instances will send `stderr` and `stdout` streams to Cloud Logging by default. Please note that the logs incur cost, which are subject to [Cloud Logging pricing](https://cloud.google.com/logging/pricing). User can disable container logging by setting this flag to true.

inputFields.name: enableAccessLogging
inputFields.description: If true, online prediction access logs are sent to Cloud Logging. These logs are like standard server access logs, containing information like timestamp and latency for each prediction request. Note that logs may incur a cost, especially if your project receives prediction requests at a high queries per second rate (QPS). Estimate your costs before enabling this option.

inputFields.name: systemLabels
inputFields.description: System labels to apply to Model Garden deployments. System labels are managed by Google for internal use only.

inputFields.name: checkpointId
inputFields.description: The checkpoint id of the model.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1PrivateEndpoints_Input
types.description: PrivateEndpoints proto is used to provide paths for users to send requests privately. To send request via private service access, use predict_http_uri, explain_http_uri or health_http_uri. To send request via private service connect, use service_attachment.

inputFields.name: predictHttpUri
inputFields.description: Output only. Http(s) path to send prediction requests.

inputFields.name: explainHttpUri
inputFields.description: Output only. Http(s) path to send explain requests.

inputFields.name: healthHttpUri
inputFields.description: Output only. Http(s) path to send health check requests.

inputFields.name: serviceAttachment
inputFields.description: Output only. The name of the service attachment resource. Populated if private service connect is enabled.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1FasterDeploymentConfig_Input
types.description: Configuration for faster model deployment.

inputFields.name: fastTryoutEnabled
inputFields.description: If true, enable fast tryout feature for this deployed model.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1DeployedModelStatus_Input
types.description: Runtime status of the deployed model.

inputFields.name: message
inputFields.description: Output only. The latest deployed model's status message (if any).

inputFields.name: lastUpdateTime
inputFields.description: Output only. The time at which the status was last updated.

inputFields.name: availableReplicaCount
inputFields.description: Output only. The number of available replicas of the deployed model.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1SpeculativeDecodingSpec_Input
types.description: Configuration for Speculative Decoding.

inputFields.name: speculativeTokenCount
inputFields.description: The number of speculative tokens to generate at each step.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1SpeculativeDecodingSpecDraftModelSpeculation_Input
types.description: Draft model speculation works by using the smaller model to generate candidate tokens for speculative decoding.

inputFields.name: draftModel
inputFields.description: Required. The resource name of the draft model.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1SpeculativeDecodingSpecNgramSpeculation_Input
types.description: N-Gram speculation works by trying to find matching tokens in the previous prompt sequence and use those as speculation for generating new tokens.

inputFields.name: ngramSize
inputFields.description: The number of last N input tokens used as ngram to search/match against the previous prompt sequence. This is equal to the N in N-Gram. The default value is 3 if not specified.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1PredictRequestResponseLoggingConfig_Input
types.description: Configuration for logging request-response to a BigQuery table.

inputFields.name: enabled
inputFields.description: If logging is enabled or not.

inputFields.name: samplingRate
inputFields.description: Percentage of requests to be logged, expressed as a fraction in range(0,1].

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1GdcConfig_Input
types.description: Google Distributed Cloud (GDC) config.

inputFields.name: zone
inputFields.description: GDC zone. A cluster will be designated for the Vertex AI workload in this zone.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1ClientConnectionConfig_Input
types.description: Configurations (e.g. inference timeout) that are applied on your endpoints.

inputFields.name: inferenceTimeout
inputFields.description: Customizable online prediction request timeout.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1GenAiAdvancedFeaturesConfig_Input
types.description: Configuration for GenAiAdvancedFeatures.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1GenAiAdvancedFeaturesConfigRagConfig_Input
types.description: Configuration for Retrieval Augmented Generation feature.

inputFields.name: enableRag
inputFields.description: If true, enable Retrieval Augmented Generation in ChatCompletion request. Once enabled, the endpoint will be identified as GenAI endpoint and Arthedain router will be used.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1UpdateEndpointLongRunningRequest_Input
types.description: Request message for EndpointService.UpdateEndpointLongRunning.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1DeployModelRequest_Input
types.description: Request message for EndpointService.DeployModel.

inputFields.name: trafficSplit
inputFields.description: A map from a DeployedModel's ID to the percentage of this Endpoint's traffic that should be forwarded to that DeployedModel. If this field is non-empty, then the Endpoint's traffic_split will be overwritten with it. To refer to the ID of the just being deployed Model, a "0" should be used, and the actual ID of the new DeployedModel will be filled in its place by this method. The traffic percentage values must add up to 100. If this field is empty, then the Endpoint's traffic_split is not updated.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1UndeployModelRequest_Input
types.description: Request message for EndpointService.UndeployModel.

inputFields.name: deployedModelId
inputFields.description: Required. The ID of the DeployedModel to be undeployed from the Endpoint.

inputFields.name: trafficSplit
inputFields.description: If this field is provided, then the Endpoint's traffic_split will be overwritten with it. If last DeployedModel is being undeployed from the Endpoint, the [Endpoint.traffic_split] will always end up empty when this call returns. A DeployedModel will be successfully undeployed only if it doesn't have any traffic assigned to it when this method executes, or if this field unassigns any traffic to it.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1MutateDeployedModelRequest_Input
types.description: Request message for EndpointService.MutateDeployedModel.

inputFields.name: updateMask
inputFields.description: Required. The update mask applies to the resource. See google.protobuf.FieldMask.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1PredictResponse
types.description: Response message for PredictionService.Predict.

fields.name: predictions

types.description: Message that represents an arbitrary HTTP body. It should only be used for payload formats that can't be represented as JSON, such as raw binary or an HTML page. This message can be used both in streaming and non-streaming API methods in the request as well as the response. It can be used as a top-level request field, which is convenient if one wants to extract parameters from either the URL or HTTP template into the request fields and also want access to the raw HTTP body. Example: message GetResourceRequest { // A unique request id. string request_id = 1; // The raw HTTP body is bound to this field. google.api.HttpBody http_body = 2; } service ResourceService { rpc GetResource(GetResourceRequest) returns (google.api.HttpBody); rpc UpdateResource(google.api.HttpBody) returns (google.protobuf.Empty); } Example with streaming methods: service CaldavService { rpc GetCalendar(stream google.api.HttpBody) returns (stream google.api.HttpBody); rpc UpdateCalendar(stream google.api.HttpBody) returns (stream google.api.HttpBody); } Use of this type only changes how the request and response bodies are handled, all other features will continue to work unchanged.

types.description: Response message for PredictionService.Explain.

fields.name: explanations
fields.description: The explanations of the Model's PredictResponse.predictions. It has the same number of elements as instances to be explained.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1Explanation
types.description: Explanation of a prediction (provided in PredictResponse.predictions) produced by the Model on a given instance.

fields.name: attributions
fields.description: Output only. Feature attributions grouped by predicted outputs. For Models that predict only one output, such as regression Models that predict only one score, there is only one attibution that explains the predicted output. For Models that predict multiple outputs, such as multiclass Models that predict multiple classes, each element explains one specific item. Attribution.output_index can be used to identify which output this attribution is explaining. By default, we provide Shapley values for the predicted class. However, you can configure the explanation request to generate Shapley values for any other classes too. For example, if a model predicts a probability of `0.4` for approving a loan application, the model's decision is to reject the application since `p(reject) = 0.6 > p(approve) = 0.4`, and the default Shapley values would be computed for rejection decision and not approval, even though the latter might be the positive class. If users set ExplanationParameters.top_k, the attributions are sorted by instance_output_value in descending order. If ExplanationParameters.output_indices is specified, the attributions are stored by Attribution.output_index in the same order as they appear in the output_indices.

fields.name: neighbors
fields.description: Output only. List of the nearest neighbors for example-based explanations. For models deployed with the examples explanations feature enabled, the attributions field is empty and instead the neighbors field is populated.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1Neighbor
types.description: Neighbors for example-based explanations.

fields.name: neighborId
fields.description: Output only. The neighbor id.

fields.name: neighborDistance
fields.description: Output only. The neighbor distance.

The schema of any single instance may be specified via Endpoint's DeployedModels' Model's PredictSchemata's instance_schema_uri.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1GenerateContentResponse
types.description: Response message for [PredictionService.GenerateContent].

fields.name: candidates
fields.description: Output only. Generated candidates.

fields.name: modelVersion
fields.description: Output only. The model version used to generate the response.

fields.name: createTime
fields.description: Output only. Timestamp when the request is made to the server.

fields.name: responseId
fields.description: Output only. response_id is used to identify each response. It is the encoding of the event_id.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1Candidate
types.description: A response candidate generated from the model.

fields.name: index
fields.description: Output only. The 0-based index of this candidate in the list of generated responses. This is useful for distinguishing between multiple candidates when `candidate_count` > 1.

fields.name: avgLogprobs
fields.description: Output only. The average log probability of the tokens in this candidate. This is a length-normalized score that can be used to compare the quality of candidates of different lengths. A higher average log probability suggests a more confident and coherent response.

fields.name: safetyRatings
fields.description: Output only. A list of ratings for the safety of a response candidate. There is at most one rating per category.

fields.name: finishMessage
fields.description: Output only. Describes the reason the model stopped generating tokens in more detail. This field is returned only when `finish_reason` is set.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1LogprobsResult
types.description: The log probabilities of the tokens generated by the model. This is useful for understanding the model's confidence in its predictions and for debugging. For example, you can use log probabilities to identify when the model is making a less confident prediction or to explore alternative responses that the model considered. A low log probability can also indicate that the model is "hallucinating" or generating factually incorrect information.

fields.name: topCandidates
fields.description: A list of the top candidate tokens at each decoding step. The length of this list is equal to the total number of decoding steps.

fields.name: chosenCandidates
fields.description: A list of the chosen candidate tokens at each decoding step. The length of this list is equal to the total number of decoding steps. Note that the chosen candidate might not be in `top_candidates`.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1LogprobsResultTopCandidates
types.description: A list of the top candidate tokens and their log probabilities at each decoding step. This can be used to see what other tokens the model considered.

fields.name: candidates
fields.description: The list of candidate tokens, sorted by log probability in descending order.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1LogprobsResultCandidate
types.description: A single token and its associated log probability.

fields.name: token
fields.description: The token's string representation.

fields.name: tokenId
fields.description: The token's numerical ID. While the `token` field provides the string representation of the token, the `token_id` is the numerical representation that the model uses internally. This can be useful for developers who want to build custom logic based on the model's vocabulary.

fields.name: logProbability
fields.description: The log probability of this token. A higher value indicates that the model was more confident in this token. The log probability can be used to assess the relative likelihood of different tokens and to identify when the model is uncertain.

types.name: mutation_aiplatform_projects_locations_endpoints_generateContent_candidates_items_finishReason
types.description: Output only. The reason why the model stopped generating tokens. If empty, the model has not stopped generating.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1SafetyRating
types.description: A safety rating for a piece of content. The safety rating contains the harm category and the harm probability level.

fields.name: probabilityScore
fields.description: Output only. The probability score of harm for this category.

fields.name: severityScore
fields.description: Output only. The severity score of harm for this category.

fields.name: blocked
fields.description: Output only. Indicates whether the content was blocked because of this rating.

types.name: mutation_aiplatform_projects_locations_endpoints_generateContent_candidates_items_safetyRatings_items_category

types.name: mutation_aiplatform_projects_locations_endpoints_generateContent_candidates_items_safetyRatings_items_probability

types.name: mutation_aiplatform_projects_locations_endpoints_generateContent_candidates_items_safetyRatings_items_severity

types.description: A collection of citations that apply to a piece of generated content.

fields.name: citations

types.description: A citation for a piece of generatedcontent.

fields.name: startIndex

fields.name: endIndex

fields.name: title

fields.name: license
fields.description: Output only. The license of the source of the citation.

types.name: GoogleTypeDate
types.description: Represents a whole or partial calendar date, such as a birthday. The time of day and time zone are either specified elsewhere or are insignificant. The date is relative to the Gregorian Calendar. This can represent one of the following: * A full date, with non-zero year, month, and day values. * A month and day, with a zero year (for example, an anniversary). * A year on its own, with a zero month and a zero day. * A year and month, with a zero day (for example, a credit card expiration date). Related types: * google.type.TimeOfDay * google.type.DateTime * google.protobuf.Timestamp

fields.name: year
fields.description: Year of the date. Must be from 1 to 9999, or 0 to specify a date without a year.

fields.name: month
fields.description: Month of a year. Must be from 1 to 12, or 0 to specify a year without a month and day.

fields.name: day
fields.description: Day of a month. Must be from 1 to 31 and valid for the year and month, or 0 to specify a year by itself or a year and month where the day isn't significant.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1UrlContextMetadata
types.description: Metadata returned when the model uses the `url_context` tool to get information from a user-provided URL.

fields.name: urlMetadata
fields.description: Output only. A list of URL metadata, with one entry for each URL retrieved by the tool.

types.description: The metadata for a single URL retrieval.

fields.name: retrievedUrl

types.description: The status of the URL retrieval.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1GenerateContentResponsePromptFeedback
types.description: Content filter results for a prompt sent in the request. Note: This is sent only in the first stream chunk and only if no candidates were generated due to content violations.

fields.name: safetyRatings
fields.description: Output only. A list of safety ratings for the prompt. There is one rating per category.

fields.name: blockReasonMessage
fields.description: Output only. A readable message that explains the reason why the prompt was blocked.

types.name: mutation_aiplatform_projects_locations_endpoints_generateContent_promptFeedback_blockReason
types.description: Output only. The reason why the prompt was blocked.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1GenerateContentResponseUsageMetadata
types.description: Usage metadata about the content generation request and response. This message provides a detailed breakdown of token usage and other relevant metrics.

fields.name: promptTokenCount
fields.description: The total number of tokens in the prompt. This includes any text, images, or other media provided in the request. When `cached_content` is set, this also includes the number of tokens in the cached content.

fields.name: candidatesTokenCount
fields.description: The total number of tokens in the generated candidates.

fields.name: totalTokenCount
fields.description: The total number of tokens for the entire request. This is the sum of `prompt_token_count`, `candidates_token_count`, `tool_use_prompt_token_count`, and `thoughts_token_count`.

fields.name: toolUsePromptTokenCount
fields.description: Output only. The number of tokens in the results from tool executions, which are provided back to the model as input, if applicable.

fields.name: thoughtsTokenCount
fields.description: Output only. The number of tokens that were part of the model's generated "thoughts" output, if applicable.

fields.name: cachedContentTokenCount
fields.description: Output only. The number of tokens in the cached content that was used for this request.

fields.name: promptTokensDetails
fields.description: Output only. A detailed breakdown of the token count for each modality in the prompt.

fields.name: cacheTokensDetails
fields.description: Output only. A detailed breakdown of the token count for each modality in the cached content.

fields.name: candidatesTokensDetails
fields.description: Output only. A detailed breakdown of the token count for each modality in the generated candidates.

fields.name: toolUsePromptTokensDetails
fields.description: Output only. A detailed breakdown by modality of the token counts from the results of tool executions, which are provided back to the model as input.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1ModalityTokenCount
types.description: Represents a breakdown of token usage by modality. This message is used in CountTokensResponse and GenerateContentResponse.UsageMetadata to provide a detailed view of how many tokens are used by each modality (e.g., text, image, video) in a request. This is particularly useful for multimodal models, allowing you to track and manage token consumption for billing and quota purposes.

fields.name: tokenCount
fields.description: The number of tokens counted for this modality.

types.name: mutation_aiplatform_projects_locations_endpoints_generateContent_usageMetadata_promptTokensDetails_items_modality
types.description: The modality that this token count applies to.

types.name: mutation_aiplatform_projects_locations_endpoints_generateContent_usageMetadata_trafficType
types.description: Output only. The traffic type for this request.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1GenerateContentRequest_Input
types.description: Request message for [PredictionService.GenerateContent].

inputFields.name: contents
inputFields.description: Required. The content of the current conversation with the model. For single-turn queries, this is a single instance. For multi-turn queries, this is a repeated field that contains conversation history + latest request.

inputFields.name: cachedContent
inputFields.description: Optional. The name of the cached content used as context to serve the prediction. Note: only used in explicit caching, where users can have control over caching (e.g. what content to cache) and enjoy guaranteed cost savings. Format: `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/cachedContents/{cachedContent}`

inputFields.name: tools
inputFields.description: Optional. A list of `Tools` the model may use to generate the next response. A `Tool` is a piece of code that enables the system to interact with external systems to perform an action, or set of actions, outside of knowledge and scope of the model.

inputFields.name: labels
inputFields.description: Optional. The labels with user-defined metadata for the request. It is used for billing and reporting only. Label keys and values can be no longer than 63 characters (Unicode codepoints) and can only contain lowercase letters, numeric characters, underscores, and dashes. International characters are allowed. Label values are optional. Label keys must start with a letter.

inputFields.name: safetySettings
inputFields.description: Optional. Per request settings for blocking unsafe content. Enforced on GenerateContentResponse.candidates.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1ToolConfig_Input
types.description: Tool config. This config is shared for all tools provided in the request.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1FunctionCallingConfig_Input
types.description: Function calling config.

inputFields.name: allowedFunctionNames
inputFields.description: Optional. Function names to call. Only set when the Mode is ANY. Function names should match FunctionDeclaration.name. With mode set to ANY, model will predict a function call from the set of function names provided.

inputFields.name: streamFunctionCallArguments
inputFields.description: Optional. When set to true, arguments of a single function call will be streamed out in multiple parts/contents/responses. Partial parameter results will be returned in the `FunctionCall.partial_args` field.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1RetrievalConfig_Input
types.description: Retrieval config.

inputFields.name: languageCode
inputFields.description: The language code of the user.

types.name: GoogleTypeLatLng_Input
types.description: An object that represents a latitude/longitude pair. This is expressed as a pair of doubles to represent degrees latitude and degrees longitude. Unless specified otherwise, this object must conform to the WGS84 standard. Values must be within normalized ranges.

inputFields.name: latitude
inputFields.description: The latitude in degrees. It must be in the range [-90.0, +90.0].

inputFields.name: longitude
inputFields.description: The longitude in degrees. It must be in the range [-180.0, +180.0].

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1SafetySetting_Input
types.description: A safety setting that affects the safety-blocking behavior. A SafetySetting consists of a harm category and a threshold for that category.

types.name: mutationInput_aiplatform_projects_locations_endpoints_generateContent_input_safetySettings_items_category
types.description: Required. The harm category to be blocked.

types.name: mutationInput_aiplatform_projects_locations_endpoints_generateContent_input_safetySettings_items_threshold
types.description: Required. The threshold for blocking content. If the harm probability exceeds this threshold, the content will be blocked.

types.name: mutationInput_aiplatform_projects_locations_endpoints_generateContent_input_safetySettings_items_method
types.description: Optional. The method for blocking content. If not specified, the default behavior is to use the probability score.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1ModelArmorConfig_Input
types.description: Configuration for Model Armor. Model Armor is a Google Cloud service that provides safety and security filtering for prompts and responses. It helps protect your AI applications from risks such as harmful content, sensitive data leakage, and prompt injection attacks.

inputFields.name: promptTemplateName
inputFields.description: Optional. The resource name of the Model Armor template to use for prompt screening. A Model Armor template is a set of customized filters and thresholds that define how Model Armor screens content. If specified, Model Armor will use this template to check the user's prompt for safety and security risks before it is sent to the model. The name must be in the format `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/templates/{template}`.

inputFields.name: responseTemplateName
inputFields.description: Optional. The resource name of the Model Armor template to use for response screening. A Model Armor template is a set of customized filters and thresholds that define how Model Armor screens content. If specified, Model Armor will use this template to check the model's response for safety and security risks before it is returned to the user. The name must be in the format `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/templates/{template}`.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1CountTokensResponse
types.description: Response message for PredictionService.CountTokens.

fields.name: totalTokens
fields.description: The total number of tokens counted across all instances from the request.

fields.name: totalBillableCharacters
fields.description: The total number of billable characters counted across all instances from the request.

fields.name: promptTokensDetails
fields.description: Output only. List of modalities that were processed in the request input.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1CountTokensRequest_Input
types.description: Request message for PredictionService.CountTokens.

inputFields.name: model
inputFields.description: Optional. The name of the publisher model requested to serve the prediction. Format: `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/publishers/*/models/*`

inputFields.name: instances

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1EvaluationRun_Input

inputFields.name: name

inputFields.name: completionTime

inputFields.name: evaluationSetSnapshot
inputFields.description: Output only. The specific evaluation set of the evaluation run. For runs with an evaluation set input, this will be that same set. For runs with BigQuery input, it's the sampled BigQuery dataset.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1EvaluationRunDataSource_Input
types.description: The data source for the evaluation run.

inputFields.name: evaluationSet
inputFields.description: The EvaluationSet resource name. Format: `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/evaluationSets/{evaluation_set}`

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1BigQueryRequestSet_Input

inputFields.name: uri
inputFields.description: Required. The URI of a BigQuery table. e.g. bq://projectId.bqDatasetId.bqTableId

inputFields.name: promptColumn
inputFields.description: Optional. The name of the column that contains the requests to evaluate. This will be in evaluation_item.EvalPrompt format.

inputFields.name: rubricsColumn
inputFields.description: Optional. The name of the column that contains the rubrics. This is in evaluation_rubric.RubricGroup format.

inputFields.name: candidateResponseColumns
inputFields.description: Optional. Map of candidate name to candidate response column name. The column will be in evaluation_item.CandidateResponse format.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1BigQueryRequestSetSamplingConfig_Input

inputFields.name: samplingCount
inputFields.description: Optional. The total number of logged data to import. If available data is less than the sampling count, all data will be imported. Default is 100.

inputFields.name: samplingDuration
inputFields.description: Optional. How long to wait before sampling data from the BigQuery table. If not specified, defaults to 0.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1EvaluationRunEvaluationConfig_Input
types.description: The Evalution configuration used for the evaluation run.

inputFields.name: metrics
inputFields.description: Required. The metrics to be calculated in the evaluation run.

inputFields.name: rubricConfigs
inputFields.description: Optional. The rubric configs for the evaluation run. They are used to generate rubrics which can be used by rubric-based metrics. Multiple rubric configs can be specified for rubric generation but only one rubric config can be used for a rubric-based metric. If more than one rubric config is provided, the evaluation metric must specify a rubric group key. Note that if a generation spec is specified on both a rubric config and an evaluation metric, the rubrics generated for the metric will be used for evaluation.

inputFields.name: datasetCustomMetrics
inputFields.description: Optional. Specifications for custom dataset-level aggregations.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1EvaluationRunMetric_Input
types.description: The metric used for evaluation runs.

inputFields.name: metric

inputFields.name: metricResourceName
inputFields.description: Optional. The resource name of the metric definition.

inputFields.name: rubricGroupKey
inputFields.description: Use a pre-defined group of rubrics associated with the input content. This refers to a key in the `rubric_groups` map of `RubricEnhancedContents`.

inputFields.name: metricPromptTemplate
inputFields.description: Optional. Template for the prompt used by the judge model to evaluate against rubrics.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1EvaluationRunMetricRubricBasedMetricSpecRepeatedRubrics_Input

inputFields.name: rubrics

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1Rubric_Input
types.description: Message representing a single testable criterion for evaluation. One input prompt could have multiple rubrics.

inputFields.name: rubricId
inputFields.description: Unique identifier for the rubric. This ID is used to refer to this rubric, e.g., in RubricVerdict.

inputFields.name: type
inputFields.description: Optional. A type designator for the rubric, which can inform how it's evaluated or interpreted by systems or users. It's recommended to use consistent, well-defined, upper snake_case strings. Examples: "SUMMARIZATION_QUALITY", "SAFETY_HARMFUL_CONTENT", "INSTRUCTION_ADHERENCE".

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1RubricContent_Input
types.description: Content of the rubric, defining the testable criteria.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1RubricContentProperty_Input
types.description: Defines criteria based on a specific property.

inputFields.name: description
inputFields.description: Description of the property being evaluated. Example: "The model's response is grammatically correct."

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1EvaluationRunMetricRubricGenerationSpec_Input
types.description: Specification for how rubrics should be generated.

inputFields.name: promptTemplate
inputFields.description: Optional. Template for the prompt used to generate rubrics. The details should be updated based on the most-recent recipe requirements.

inputFields.name: rubricTypeOntology
inputFields.description: Optional. An optional, pre-defined list of allowed types for generated rubrics. If this field is provided, it implies `include_rubric_type` should be true, and the generated rubric types should be chosen from this ontology.

inputFields.name: metricResourceName
inputFields.description: Optional. Resource name of the metric definition.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1EvaluationRunEvaluationConfigAutoraterConfig_Input
types.description: The autorater config used for the evaluation run.

inputFields.name: sampleCount
inputFields.description: Optional. Number of samples for each instance in the dataset. If not specified, the default is 4. Minimum value is 1, maximum value is 32.

inputFields.name: autoraterModel
inputFields.description: Optional. The fully qualified name of the publisher model or tuned autorater endpoint to use. Publisher model format: `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/publishers/*/models/*` Tuned model endpoint format: `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/endpoints/{endpoint}`

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1EvaluationRunMetricPredefinedMetricSpec_Input
types.description: Specification for a pre-defined metric.

inputFields.name: metricSpecName
inputFields.description: Required. The name of a pre-defined metric, such as "instruction_following_v1" or "text_quality_v1".

inputFields.name: parameters
inputFields.description: Optional. The parameters needed to run the pre-defined metric.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1EvaluationRunMetricComputationBasedMetricSpec_Input
types.description: Specification for a computation based metric.

inputFields.name: parameters
inputFields.description: Optional. A map of parameters for the metric, e.g. {"rouge_type": "rougeL"}.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1EvaluationRunMetricLLMBasedMetricSpec_Input
types.description: Specification for an LLM based metric.

inputFields.name: rubricGroupKey
inputFields.description: Use a pre-defined group of rubrics associated with the input. Refers to a key in the rubric_groups map of EvaluationInstance.

inputFields.name: metricPromptTemplate
inputFields.description: Required. Template for the prompt sent to the judge model.

inputFields.name: systemInstruction
inputFields.description: Optional. System instructions for the judge model.

inputFields.name: additionalConfig
inputFields.description: Optional. Optional additional configuration for the metric.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1EvaluationRubricConfig_Input
types.description: Configuration for a rubric group to be generated/saved for evaluation.

inputFields.name: rubricGroupKey
inputFields.description: Required. The key used to save the generated rubrics. If a generation spec is provided, this key will be used for the name of the generated rubric group. Otherwise, this key will be used to look up the existing rubric group on the evaluation item. Note that if a rubric group key is specified on both a rubric config and an evaluation metric, the key from the metric will be used to select the rubrics for evaluation.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1EvaluationRunEvaluationConfigOutputConfig_Input
types.description: The output config for the evaluation run.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1EvaluationRunEvaluationConfigPromptTemplate_Input
types.description: Prompt template used for inference.

inputFields.name: promptTemplate
inputFields.description: Inline prompt template. Template variables should be in the format "{var_name}". Example: "Translate the following from {source_lang} to {target_lang}: {text}"

inputFields.name: gcsUri
inputFields.description: Prompt template stored in Cloud Storage. Format: "gs://my-bucket/file-name.txt".

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1DatasetCustomMetric_Input
types.description: Defines a custom dataset-level aggregation.

inputFields.name: displayName
inputFields.description: Optional. A display name for this custom summary metric. Used to prefix keys in the output summaryMetrics map. If not provided, a default name like "dataset_custom_metric_1", "dataset_custom_metric_2", etc., will be generated based on the order in the repeated field.

inputFields.name: aggregationFunction
inputFields.description: Required. The Python code string containing the aggregation function. Expected function signature: `def aggregate(instances: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> dict[str, float]:` The `instances` argument is a list of dictionaries, where each dictionary represents a single evaluation result item. The structure of each dictionary corresponds to the fields in the `EvaluationResult` message. This includes: - `"request"`: Contains the original input data and model inputs (from `EvaluationResult.EvaluationRequest`). - `"candidate_results"`: Contains the results of any instance-level metrics (from `EvaluationResult.CandidateResults`). Example of a single item in the `instances` list: { "request": { "prompt": {"text": "What is the capital of France?"}, "golden_response": {"text": "Paris"}, "candidate_responses": [{"candidate": "model-v1", "text": "Paris"}] }, "candidate_results": [ {"metric": "exact_match", "score": 1.0}, {"metric": "bleu", "score": 0.9} ] }

types.name: GoogleRpcStatus_Input
types.description: The `Status` type defines a logical error model that is suitable for different programming environments, including REST APIs and RPC APIs. It is used by [gRPC](https://github.com/grpc). Each `Status` message contains three pieces of data: error code, error message, and error details. You can find out more about this error model and how to work with it in the [API Design Guide](https://cloud.google.com/apis/design/errors).

inputFields.name: code
inputFields.description: The status code, which should be an enum value of google.rpc.Code.

inputFields.name: message
inputFields.description: A developer-facing error message, which should be in English. Any user-facing error message should be localized and sent in the google.rpc.Status.details field, or localized by the client.

inputFields.name: details
inputFields.description: A list of messages that carry the error details. There is a common set of message types for APIs to use.

inputFields.name: displayName

inputFields.name: metadata

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1EvaluationRequest_Input
types.description: A single evaluation request supporting input for both single-turn model generation and multi-turn agent execution traces. Valid input modes: 1. Inference Mode: `prompt` is set (containing text or AgentData context). 2. Offline Eval Mode: `prompt` is unset, and `candidate_responses` contains `agent_data` (the completed execution trace). Validation Rule: Either `prompt` must be set, OR at least one of the `candidate_responses` must contain `agent_data`.

inputFields.name: candidateResponses
inputFields.description: Optional. Responses from model under test and other baseline models for comparison.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1CachedContent_Input

inputFields.description: Input only. The TTL for this resource. The expiration time is computed: now + TTL.

inputFields.name: createTime

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1EmbedContentResponse
types.description: Response message for PredictionService.EmbedContent.

fields.name: truncated
fields.description: Whether the input content was truncated before generating the embedding.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1EmbedContentResponseEmbedding
types.description: A list of floats representing an embedding.

fields.name: values
fields.description: Embedding vector values.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1UsageMetadata
types.description: Usage metadata about the content generation request and response. This message provides a detailed breakdown of token usage and other relevant metrics.

fields.name: promptTokenCount
fields.description: The total number of tokens in the prompt. This includes any text, images, or other media provided in the request. When `cached_content` is set, this also includes the number of tokens in the cached content.

fields.name: candidatesTokenCount
fields.description: The total number of tokens in the generated candidates.

fields.name: totalTokenCount
fields.description: The total number of tokens for the entire request. This is the sum of `prompt_token_count`, `candidates_token_count`, `tool_use_prompt_token_count`, and `thoughts_token_count`.

fields.name: toolUsePromptTokenCount
fields.description: Output only. The number of tokens in the results from tool executions, which are provided back to the model as input, if applicable.

fields.name: thoughtsTokenCount
fields.description: Output only. The number of tokens that were part of the model's generated "thoughts" output, if applicable.

fields.name: cachedContentTokenCount
fields.description: Output only. The number of tokens in the cached content that was used for this request.

fields.name: promptTokensDetails
fields.description: Output only. A detailed breakdown of the token count for each modality in the prompt.

fields.name: cacheTokensDetails
fields.description: Output only. A detailed breakdown of the token count for each modality in the cached content.

fields.name: candidatesTokensDetails
fields.description: Output only. A detailed breakdown of the token count for each modality in the generated candidates.

fields.name: toolUsePromptTokensDetails
fields.description: Output only. A detailed breakdown by modality of the token counts from the results of tool executions, which are provided back to the model as input.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1TuningJob_Input
types.description: Represents a TuningJob that runs with Google owned models.

inputFields.name: baseModel
inputFields.description: The base model that is being tuned. See [Supported models](https://cloud.google.com/vertex-ai/generative-ai/docs/model-reference/tuning#supported_models).

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description: Output only. Identifier. Resource name of a TuningJob. Format: `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/tuningJobs/{tuning_job}`

inputFields.name: tunedModelDisplayName
inputFields.description: Optional. The display name of the TunedModel. The name can be up to 128 characters long and can consist of any UTF-8 characters. For continuous tuning, tuned_model_display_name will by default use the same display name as the pre-tuned model. If a new display name is provided, the tuning job will create a new model instead of a new version.

inputFields.name: description
inputFields.description: Optional. The description of the TuningJob.

inputFields.name: createTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Time when the TuningJob was created.

inputFields.name: startTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Time when the TuningJob for the first time entered the `JOB_STATE_RUNNING` state.

inputFields.name: endTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Time when the TuningJob entered any of the following JobStates: `JOB_STATE_SUCCEEDED`, `JOB_STATE_FAILED`, `JOB_STATE_CANCELLED`, `JOB_STATE_EXPIRED`.

inputFields.name: updateTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Time when the TuningJob was most recently updated.

inputFields.name: labels
inputFields.description: Optional. The labels with user-defined metadata to organize TuningJob and generated resources such as Model and Endpoint. Label keys and values can be no longer than 64 characters (Unicode codepoints), can only contain lowercase letters, numeric characters, underscores and dashes. International characters are allowed. See https://goo.gl/xmQnxf for more information and examples of labels.

inputFields.name: experiment
inputFields.description: Output only. The Experiment associated with this TuningJob.

inputFields.name: serviceAccount
inputFields.description: The service account that the tuningJob workload runs as. If not specified, the Vertex AI Secure Fine-Tuned Service Agent in the project will be used. See https://cloud.google.com/iam/docs/service-agents#vertex-ai-secure-fine-tuning-service-agent Users starting the pipeline must have the `iam.serviceAccounts.actAs` permission on this service account.

inputFields.name: evaluateDatasetRuns
inputFields.description: Output only. Evaluation runs for the Tuning Job.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1PreTunedModel_Input
types.description: A pre-tuned model for continuous tuning.

inputFields.name: tunedModelName
inputFields.description: The resource name of the Model. E.g., a model resource name with a specified version id or alias: `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/models/{model}@{version_id}` `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/models/{model}@{alias}` Or, omit the version id to use the default version: `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/models/{model}`

inputFields.name: checkpointId
inputFields.description: Optional. The source checkpoint id. If not specified, the default checkpoint will be used.

inputFields.name: baseModel
inputFields.description: Output only. The name of the base model this PreTunedModel was tuned from.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1SupervisedTuningSpec_Input
types.description: Tuning Spec for Supervised Tuning for first party models.

inputFields.name: trainingDatasetUri
inputFields.description: Required. Training dataset used for tuning. The dataset can be specified as either a Cloud Storage path to a JSONL file or as the resource name of a Vertex Multimodal Dataset.

inputFields.name: validationDatasetUri
inputFields.description: Optional. Validation dataset used for tuning. The dataset can be specified as either a Cloud Storage path to a JSONL file or as the resource name of a Vertex Multimodal Dataset.

inputFields.name: exportLastCheckpointOnly
inputFields.description: Optional. If set to true, disable intermediate checkpoints for SFT and only the last checkpoint will be exported. Otherwise, enable intermediate checkpoints for SFT. Default is false.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1SupervisedHyperParameters_Input
types.description: Hyperparameters for SFT.

inputFields.name: epochCount
inputFields.description: Optional. Number of complete passes the model makes over the entire training dataset during training.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1Index_Input

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description: Output only. The resource name of the Index.

inputFields.description: Required. The display name of the Index. The name can be up to 128 characters long and can consist of any UTF-8 characters.

inputFields.name: description
inputFields.description: The description of the Index.

inputFields.name: metadataSchemaUri
inputFields.description: Immutable. Points to a YAML file stored on Google Cloud Storage describing additional information about the Index, that is specific to it. Unset if the Index does not have any additional information. The schema is defined as an OpenAPI 3.0.2 [Schema Object](https://github.com/OAI/OpenAPI-Specification/blob/main/versions/3.0.2.md#schemaObject). Note: The URI given on output will be immutable and probably different, including the URI scheme, than the one given on input. The output URI will point to a location where the user only has a read access.

inputFields.name: metadata
inputFields.description: An additional information about the Index; the schema of the metadata can be found in metadata_schema.

inputFields.name: deployedIndexes
inputFields.description: Output only. The pointers to DeployedIndexes created from this Index. An Index can be only deleted if all its DeployedIndexes had been undeployed first.

inputFields.name: etag
inputFields.description: Used to perform consistent read-modify-write updates. If not set, a blind "overwrite" update happens.

inputFields.name: labels
inputFields.description: The labels with user-defined metadata to organize your Indexes. Label keys and values can be no longer than 64 characters (Unicode codepoints), can only contain lowercase letters, numeric characters, underscores and dashes. International characters are allowed. See https://goo.gl/xmQnxf for more information and examples of labels.

inputFields.name: createTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Timestamp when this Index was created.

inputFields.name: updateTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Timestamp when this Index was most recently updated. This also includes any update to the contents of the Index. Note that Operations working on this Index may have their Operations.metadata.generic_metadata.update_time a little after the value of this timestamp, yet that does not mean their results are not already reflected in the Index. Result of any successfully completed Operation on the Index is reflected in it.

inputFields.name: satisfiesPzs
inputFields.description: Output only. Reserved for future use.

inputFields.name: satisfiesPzi
inputFields.description: Output only. Reserved for future use.

inputFields.name: crowdingAttribute
inputFields.description: The attribute value used for crowding. The maximum number of neighbors to return per crowding attribute value (per_crowding_attribute_num_neighbors) is configured per-query. This field is ignored if per_crowding_attribute_num_neighbors is larger than the total number of neighbors to return for a given query.
