types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1IndexEndpoint_Input
types.description: Indexes are deployed into it. An IndexEndpoint can have multiple DeployedIndexes.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description: Output only. The resource name of the IndexEndpoint.

inputFields.name: displayName
inputFields.description: Required. The display name of the IndexEndpoint. The name can be up to 128 characters long and can consist of any UTF-8 characters.

inputFields.name: description
inputFields.description: The description of the IndexEndpoint.

inputFields.name: deployedIndexes
inputFields.description: Output only. The indexes deployed in this endpoint.

inputFields.name: etag
inputFields.description: Used to perform consistent read-modify-write updates. If not set, a blind "overwrite" update happens.

inputFields.name: labels
inputFields.description: The labels with user-defined metadata to organize your IndexEndpoints. Label keys and values can be no longer than 64 characters (Unicode codepoints), can only contain lowercase letters, numeric characters, underscores and dashes. International characters are allowed. See https://goo.gl/xmQnxf for more information and examples of labels.

inputFields.name: createTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Timestamp when this IndexEndpoint was created.

inputFields.name: updateTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Timestamp when this IndexEndpoint was last updated. This timestamp is not updated when the endpoint's DeployedIndexes are updated, e.g. due to updates of the original Indexes they are the deployments of.

inputFields.name: network
inputFields.description: Optional. The full name of the Google Compute Engine [network](https://cloud.google.com/compute/docs/networks-and-firewalls#networks) to which the IndexEndpoint should be peered. Private services access must already be configured for the network. If left unspecified, the Endpoint is not peered with any network. network and private_service_connect_config are mutually exclusive. [Format](https://cloud.google.com/compute/docs/reference/rest/v1/networks/insert): `projects/{project}/global/networks/{network}`. Where {project} is a project number, as in '12345', and {network} is network name.

inputFields.name: enablePrivateServiceConnect
inputFields.description: Optional. Deprecated: If true, expose the IndexEndpoint via private service connect. Only one of the fields, network or enable_private_service_connect, can be set.

inputFields.name: publicEndpointEnabled
inputFields.description: Optional. If true, the deployed index will be accessible through public endpoint.

inputFields.name: publicEndpointDomainName
inputFields.description: Output only. If public_endpoint_enabled is true, this field will be populated with the domain name to use for this index endpoint.

inputFields.name: satisfiesPzs
inputFields.description: Output only. Reserved for future use.

inputFields.name: satisfiesPzi
inputFields.description: Output only. Reserved for future use.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1DeployedIndex_Input
types.description: A deployment of an Index. IndexEndpoints contain one or more DeployedIndexes.

inputFields.name: id
inputFields.description: Required. The user specified ID of the DeployedIndex. The ID can be up to 128 characters long and must start with a letter and only contain letters, numbers, and underscores. The ID must be unique within the project it is created in.

inputFields.name: index
inputFields.description: Required. The name of the Index this is the deployment of. We may refer to this Index as the DeployedIndex's "original" Index.

inputFields.name: displayName
inputFields.description: The display name of the DeployedIndex. If not provided upon creation, the Index's display_name is used.

inputFields.name: createTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Timestamp when the DeployedIndex was created.

inputFields.name: indexSyncTime
inputFields.description: Output only. The DeployedIndex may depend on various data on its original Index. Additionally when certain changes to the original Index are being done (e.g. when what the Index contains is being changed) the DeployedIndex may be asynchronously updated in the background to reflect these changes. If this timestamp's value is at least the Index.update_time of the original Index, it means that this DeployedIndex and the original Index are in sync. If this timestamp is older, then to see which updates this DeployedIndex already contains (and which it does not), one must list the operations that are running on the original Index. Only the successfully completed Operations with update_time equal or before this sync time are contained in this DeployedIndex.

inputFields.name: enableAccessLogging
inputFields.description: Optional. If true, private endpoint's access logs are sent to Cloud Logging. These logs are like standard server access logs, containing information like timestamp and latency for each MatchRequest. Note that logs may incur a cost, especially if the deployed index receives a high queries per second rate (QPS). Estimate your costs before enabling this option.

inputFields.name: enableDatapointUpsertLogging
inputFields.description: Optional. If true, logs to Cloud Logging errors relating to datapoint upserts. Under normal operation conditions, these log entries should be very rare. However, if incompatible datapoint updates are being uploaded to an index, a high volume of log entries may be generated in a short period of time. Note that logs may incur a cost, especially if the deployed index receives a high volume of datapoint upserts. Estimate your costs before enabling this option.

inputFields.name: reservedIpRanges
inputFields.description: Optional. A list of reserved ip ranges under the VPC network that can be used for this DeployedIndex. If set, we will deploy the index within the provided ip ranges. Otherwise, the index might be deployed to any ip ranges under the provided VPC network. The value should be the name of the address (https://cloud.google.com/compute/docs/reference/rest/v1/addresses) Example: ['vertex-ai-ip-range']. For more information about subnets and network IP ranges, please see https://cloud.google.com/vpc/docs/subnets#manually_created_subnet_ip_ranges.

inputFields.name: deploymentGroup
inputFields.description: Optional. The deployment group can be no longer than 64 characters (eg: 'test', 'prod'). If not set, we will use the 'default' deployment group. Creating `deployment_groups` with `reserved_ip_ranges` is a recommended practice when the peered network has multiple peering ranges. This creates your deployments from predictable IP spaces for easier traffic administration. Also, one deployment_group (except 'default') can only be used with the same reserved_ip_ranges which means if the deployment_group has been used with reserved_ip_ranges: [a, b, c], using it with [a, b] or [d, e] is disallowed. Note: we only support up to 5 deployment groups(not including 'default').

inputFields.name: pscAutomationConfigs
inputFields.description: Optional. If set for PSC deployed index, PSC connection will be automatically created after deployment is done and the endpoint information is populated in private_endpoints.psc_automated_endpoints.

To send request via private service access, use match_grpc_address. To send request via private service connect, use service_attachment.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1FindNeighborsResponseNeighbor
types.description: A neighbor of the query vector.

fields.name: distance
fields.description: The distance between the neighbor and the dense embedding query.

fields.name: sparseDistance
fields.description: The distance between the neighbor and the query sparse_embedding.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1IndexDatapoint
types.description: A datapoint of Index.

fields.name: datapointId
fields.description: Required. Unique identifier of the datapoint.

fields.name: featureVector
fields.description: Required. Feature embedding vector for dense index. An array of numbers with the length of [NearestNeighborSearchConfig.dimensions].

fields.name: restricts
fields.description: Optional. List of Restrict of the datapoint, used to perform "restricted searches" where boolean rule are used to filter the subset of the database eligible for matching. This uses categorical tokens. See: https://cloud.google.com/vertex-ai/docs/matching-engine/filtering

fields.name: numericRestricts
fields.description: Optional. List of Restrict of the datapoint, used to perform "restricted searches" where boolean rule are used to filter the subset of the database eligible for matching. This uses numeric comparisons.

fields.name: embeddingMetadata
fields.description: Optional. The key-value map of additional metadata for the datapoint.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1IndexDatapointSparseEmbedding
types.description: Feature embedding vector for sparse index. An array of numbers whose values are located in the specified dimensions.

fields.name: values
fields.description: Required. The list of embedding values of the sparse vector.

fields.name: dimensions
fields.description: Required. The list of indexes for the embedding values of the sparse vector.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1IndexDatapointRestriction
types.description: Restriction of a datapoint which describe its attributes(tokens) from each of several attribute categories(namespaces).

fields.name: namespace
fields.description: The namespace of this restriction. e.g.: color.

fields.name: allowList
fields.description: The attributes to allow in this namespace. e.g.: 'red'

fields.name: denyList
fields.description: The attributes to deny in this namespace. e.g.: 'blue'

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1IndexDatapointNumericRestriction
types.description: This field allows restricts to be based on numeric comparisons rather than categorical tokens.

fields.name: valueInt
fields.description: Represents 64 bit integer.

fields.name: valueFloat
fields.description: Represents 32 bit float.

fields.name: valueDouble
fields.description: Represents 64 bit float.

fields.name: namespace
fields.description: The namespace of this restriction. e.g.: cost.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1IndexDatapointCrowdingTag
types.description: Crowding tag is a constraint on a neighbor list produced by nearest neighbor search requiring that no more than some value k' of the k neighbors returned have the same value of crowding_attribute.

fields.name: crowdingAttribute
fields.description: The attribute value used for crowding. The maximum number of neighbors to return per crowding attribute value (per_crowding_attribute_num_neighbors) is configured per-query. This field is ignored if per_crowding_attribute_num_neighbors is larger than the total number of neighbors to return for a given query.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1FindNeighborsRequest_Input
types.description: The request message for MatchService.FindNeighbors.

inputFields.name: deployedIndexId
inputFields.description: The ID of the DeployedIndex that will serve the request. This request is sent to a specific IndexEndpoint, as per the IndexEndpoint.network. That IndexEndpoint also has IndexEndpoint.deployed_indexes, and each such index has a DeployedIndex.id field. The value of the field below must equal one of the DeployedIndex.id fields of the IndexEndpoint that is being called for this request.

inputFields.name: queries
inputFields.description: The list of queries.

inputFields.name: returnFullDatapoint
inputFields.description: If set to true, the full datapoints (including all vector values and restricts) of the nearest neighbors are returned. Note that returning full datapoint will significantly increase the latency and cost of the query.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1FindNeighborsRequestQuery_Input
types.description: A query to find a number of the nearest neighbors (most similar vectors) of a vector.

inputFields.name: neighborCount
inputFields.description: The number of nearest neighbors to be retrieved from database for each query. If not set, will use the default from the service configuration (https://cloud.google.com/vertex-ai/docs/matching-engine/configuring-indexes#nearest-neighbor-search-config).

inputFields.name: perCrowdingAttributeNeighborCount
inputFields.description: Crowding is a constraint on a neighbor list produced by nearest neighbor search requiring that no more than some value k' of the k neighbors returned have the same value of crowding_attribute. It's used for improving result diversity. This field is the maximum number of matches with the same crowding tag.

inputFields.name: approximateNeighborCount
inputFields.description: The number of neighbors to find via approximate search before exact reordering is performed. If not set, the default value from scam config is used; if set, this value must be > 0.

inputFields.name: fractionLeafNodesToSearchOverride
inputFields.description: The fraction of the number of leaves to search, set at query time allows user to tune search performance. This value increase result in both search accuracy and latency increase. The value should be between 0.0 and 1.0. If not set or set to 0.0, query uses the default value specified in NearestNeighborSearchConfig.TreeAHConfig.fraction_leaf_nodes_to_search.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1FindNeighborsRequestQueryRRF_Input
types.description: Parameters for RRF algorithm that combines search results.

inputFields.name: alpha
inputFields.description: Required. Users can provide an alpha value to give more weight to dense vs sparse results. For example, if the alpha is 0, we only return sparse and if the alpha is 1, we only return dense.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1ReadIndexDatapointsResponse
types.description: The response message for MatchService.ReadIndexDatapoints.

fields.name: datapoints
fields.description: The result list of datapoints.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1ReadIndexDatapointsRequest_Input
types.description: The request message for MatchService.ReadIndexDatapoints.

inputFields.name: deployedIndexId
inputFields.description: The ID of the DeployedIndex that will serve the request.

inputFields.name: ids
inputFields.description: IDs of the datapoints to be searched for.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1CustomJob_Input
types.description: Represents a job that runs custom workloads such as a Docker container or a Python package. A CustomJob can have multiple worker pools and each worker pool can have its own machine and input spec. A CustomJob will be cleaned up once the job enters terminal state (failed or succeeded).

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description: Output only. Resource name of a CustomJob.

inputFields.name: displayName
inputFields.description: Required. The display name of the CustomJob. The name can be up to 128 characters long and can consist of any UTF-8 characters.

inputFields.name: createTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Time when the CustomJob was created.

inputFields.name: startTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Time when the CustomJob for the first time entered the `JOB_STATE_RUNNING` state.

inputFields.name: endTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Time when the CustomJob entered any of the following states: `JOB_STATE_SUCCEEDED`, `JOB_STATE_FAILED`, `JOB_STATE_CANCELLED`.

inputFields.name: updateTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Time when the CustomJob was most recently updated.

inputFields.name: labels
inputFields.description: The labels with user-defined metadata to organize CustomJobs. Label keys and values can be no longer than 64 characters (Unicode codepoints), can only contain lowercase letters, numeric characters, underscores and dashes. International characters are allowed. See https://goo.gl/xmQnxf for more information and examples of labels.

inputFields.name: webAccessUris
inputFields.description: Output only. URIs for accessing [interactive shells](https://cloud.google.com/vertex-ai/docs/training/monitor-debug-interactive-shell) (one URI for each training node). Only available if job_spec.enable_web_access is `true`. The keys are names of each node in the training job; for example, `workerpool0-0` for the primary node, `workerpool1-0` for the first node in the second worker pool, and `workerpool1-1` for the second node in the second worker pool. The values are the URIs for each node's interactive shell.

inputFields.name: satisfiesPzs
inputFields.description: Output only. Reserved for future use.

inputFields.name: satisfiesPzi
inputFields.description: Output only. Reserved for future use.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1CustomJobSpec_Input
types.description: Represents the spec of a CustomJob.

inputFields.name: persistentResourceId
inputFields.description: Optional. The ID of the PersistentResource in the same Project and Location which to run If this is specified, the job will be run on existing machines held by the PersistentResource instead of on-demand short-live machines. The network and CMEK configs on the job should be consistent with those on the PersistentResource, otherwise, the job will be rejected.

inputFields.name: workerPoolSpecs
inputFields.description: Required. The spec of the worker pools including machine type and Docker image. All worker pools except the first one are optional and can be skipped by providing an empty value.

inputFields.name: serviceAccount
inputFields.description: Specifies the service account for workload run-as account. Users submitting jobs must have act-as permission on this run-as account. If unspecified, the [Vertex AI Custom Code Service Agent](https://cloud.google.com/vertex-ai/docs/general/access-control#service-agents) for the CustomJob's project is used.

inputFields.name: network
inputFields.description: Optional. The full name of the Compute Engine [network](/compute/docs/networks-and-firewalls#networks) to which the Job should be peered. For example, `projects/12345/global/networks/myVPC`. [Format](/compute/docs/reference/rest/v1/networks/insert) is of the form `projects/{project}/global/networks/{network}`. Where {project} is a project number, as in `12345`, and {network} is a network name. To specify this field, you must have already [configured VPC Network Peering for Vertex AI](https://cloud.google.com/vertex-ai/docs/general/vpc-peering). If this field is left unspecified, the job is not peered with any network.

inputFields.name: reservedIpRanges
inputFields.description: Optional. A list of names for the reserved ip ranges under the VPC network that can be used for this job. If set, we will deploy the job within the provided ip ranges. Otherwise, the job will be deployed to any ip ranges under the provided VPC network. Example: ['vertex-ai-ip-range'].

inputFields.name: protectedArtifactLocationId
inputFields.description: The ID of the location to store protected artifacts. e.g. us-central1. Populate only when the location is different than CustomJob location. List of supported locations: https://cloud.google.com/vertex-ai/docs/general/locations

inputFields.name: tensorboard
inputFields.description: Optional. The name of a Vertex AI Tensorboard resource to which this CustomJob will upload Tensorboard logs. Format: `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/tensorboards/{tensorboard}`

inputFields.name: enableWebAccess
inputFields.description: Optional. Whether you want Vertex AI to enable [interactive shell access](https://cloud.google.com/vertex-ai/docs/training/monitor-debug-interactive-shell) to training containers. If set to `true`, you can access interactive shells at the URIs given by CustomJob.web_access_uris or Trial.web_access_uris (within HyperparameterTuningJob.trials).

inputFields.name: enableDashboardAccess
inputFields.description: Optional. Whether you want Vertex AI to enable access to the customized dashboard in training chief container. If set to `true`, you can access the dashboard at the URIs given by CustomJob.web_access_uris or Trial.web_access_uris (within HyperparameterTuningJob.trials).

inputFields.name: experiment
inputFields.description: Optional. The Experiment associated with this job. Format: `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/metadataStores/{metadataStores}/contexts/{experiment-name}`

inputFields.name: experimentRun
inputFields.description: Optional. The Experiment Run associated with this job. Format: `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/metadataStores/{metadataStores}/contexts/{experiment-name}-{experiment-run-name}`

inputFields.name: models
inputFields.description: Optional. The name of the Model resources for which to generate a mapping to artifact URIs. Applicable only to some of the Google-provided custom jobs. Format: `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/models/{model}` In order to retrieve a specific version of the model, also provide the version ID or version alias. Example: `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/models/{model}@2` or `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/models/{model}@golden` If no version ID or alias is specified, the "default" version will be returned. The "default" version alias is created for the first version of the model, and can be moved to other versions later on. There will be exactly one default version.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1WorkerPoolSpec_Input
types.description: Represents the spec of a worker pool in a job.

inputFields.name: replicaCount
inputFields.description: Optional. The number of worker replicas to use for this worker pool.

inputFields.name: nfsMounts
inputFields.description: Optional. List of NFS mount spec.

inputFields.name: lustreMounts
inputFields.description: Optional. List of Lustre mounts.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1ContainerSpec_Input
types.description: The spec of a Container.

inputFields.name: imageUri
inputFields.description: Required. The URI of a container image in the Container Registry that is to be run on each worker replica.

inputFields.name: command
inputFields.description: The command to be invoked when the container is started. It overrides the entrypoint instruction in Dockerfile when provided.

inputFields.name: args
inputFields.description: The arguments to be passed when starting the container.

inputFields.name: env
inputFields.description: Environment variables to be passed to the container. Maximum limit is 100.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1PythonPackageSpec_Input
types.description: The spec of a Python packaged code.

inputFields.name: executorImageUri
inputFields.description: Required. The URI of a container image in Artifact Registry that will run the provided Python package. Vertex AI provides a wide range of executor images with pre-installed packages to meet users' various use cases. See the list of [pre-built containers for training](https://cloud.google.com/vertex-ai/docs/training/pre-built-containers). You must use an image from this list.

inputFields.name: packageUris
inputFields.description: Required. The Google Cloud Storage location of the Python package files which are the training program and its dependent packages. The maximum number of package URIs is 100.

inputFields.name: pythonModule
inputFields.description: Required. The Python module name to run after installing the packages.

inputFields.name: args
inputFields.description: Command line arguments to be passed to the Python task.

inputFields.name: env
inputFields.description: Environment variables to be passed to the python module. Maximum limit is 100.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1NfsMount_Input
types.description: Represents a mount configuration for Network File System (NFS) to mount.

inputFields.name: server
inputFields.description: Required. IP address of the NFS server.

inputFields.name: path
inputFields.description: Required. Source path exported from NFS server. Has to start with '/', and combined with the ip address, it indicates the source mount path in the form of `server:path`

inputFields.name: mountPoint
inputFields.description: Required. Destination mount path. The NFS will be mounted for the user under /mnt/nfs/

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1LustreMount_Input
types.description: Represents a mount configuration for Lustre file system.

inputFields.name: instanceIp
inputFields.description: Required. IP address of the Lustre instance.

inputFields.name: volumeHandle
inputFields.description: Required. The unique identifier of the Lustre volume.

inputFields.name: filesystem
inputFields.description: Required. The name of the Lustre filesystem.

inputFields.name: mountPoint
inputFields.description: Required. Destination mount path. The Lustre file system will be mounted for the user under /mnt/lustre/

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1DiskSpec_Input
types.description: Represents the spec of disk options.

inputFields.name: bootDiskType
inputFields.description: Type of the boot disk. For non-A3U machines, the default value is "pd-ssd", for A3U machines, the default value is "hyperdisk-balanced". Valid values: "pd-ssd" (Persistent Disk Solid State Drive), "pd-standard" (Persistent Disk Hard Disk Drive) or "hyperdisk-balanced".

inputFields.name: bootDiskSizeGb
inputFields.description: Size in GB of the boot disk (default is 100GB).

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1Scheduling_Input
types.description: All parameters related to queuing and scheduling of custom jobs.

inputFields.name: timeout
inputFields.description: Optional. The maximum job running time. The default is 7 days.

inputFields.name: restartJobOnWorkerRestart
inputFields.description: Optional. Restarts the entire CustomJob if a worker gets restarted. This feature can be used by distributed training jobs that are not resilient to workers leaving and joining a job.

inputFields.name: disableRetries
inputFields.description: Optional. Indicates if the job should retry for internal errors after the job starts running. If true, overrides `Scheduling.restart_job_on_worker_restart` to false.

inputFields.name: maxWaitDuration
inputFields.description: Optional. This is the maximum duration that a job will wait for the requested resources to be provisioned if the scheduling strategy is set to [Strategy.DWS_FLEX_START]. If set to 0, the job will wait indefinitely. The default is 24 hours.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1DataLabelingJob_Input
types.description: DataLabelingJob is used to trigger a human labeling job on unlabeled data from the following Dataset:

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description: Output only. Resource name of the DataLabelingJob.

inputFields.name: displayName
inputFields.description: Required. The user-defined name of the DataLabelingJob. The name can be up to 128 characters long and can consist of any UTF-8 characters. Display name of a DataLabelingJob.

inputFields.name: datasets
inputFields.description: Required. Dataset resource names. Right now we only support labeling from a single Dataset. Format: `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/datasets/{dataset}`

inputFields.name: annotationLabels
inputFields.description: Labels to assign to annotations generated by this DataLabelingJob. Label keys and values can be no longer than 64 characters (Unicode codepoints), can only contain lowercase letters, numeric characters, underscores and dashes. International characters are allowed. See https://goo.gl/xmQnxf for more information and examples of labels. System reserved label keys are prefixed with "aiplatform.googleapis.com/" and are immutable.

inputFields.name: labelerCount
inputFields.description: Required. Number of labelers to work on each DataItem.

inputFields.name: instructionUri
inputFields.description: Required. The Google Cloud Storage location of the instruction pdf. This pdf is shared with labelers, and provides detailed description on how to label DataItems in Datasets.

inputFields.name: inputsSchemaUri
inputFields.description: Required. Points to a YAML file stored on Google Cloud Storage describing the config for a specific type of DataLabelingJob. The schema files that can be used here are found in the https://storage.googleapis.com/google-cloud-aiplatform bucket in the /schema/datalabelingjob/inputs/ folder.

inputFields.name: inputs
inputFields.description: Required. Input config parameters for the DataLabelingJob.

inputFields.name: labelingProgress
inputFields.description: Output only. Current labeling job progress percentage scaled in interval [0, 100], indicating the percentage of DataItems that has been finished.

inputFields.name: createTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Timestamp when this DataLabelingJob was created.

inputFields.name: updateTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Timestamp when this DataLabelingJob was updated most recently.

inputFields.name: labels
inputFields.description: The labels with user-defined metadata to organize your DataLabelingJobs. Label keys and values can be no longer than 64 characters (Unicode codepoints), can only contain lowercase letters, numeric characters, underscores and dashes. International characters are allowed. See https://goo.gl/xmQnxf for more information and examples of labels. System reserved label keys are prefixed with "aiplatform.googleapis.com/" and are immutable. Following system labels exist for each DataLabelingJob: * "aiplatform.googleapis.com/schema": output only, its value is the inputs_schema's title.

inputFields.name: specialistPools
inputFields.description: The SpecialistPools' resource names associated with this job.

types.name: GoogleTypeMoney_Input
types.description: Represents an amount of money with its currency type.

inputFields.name: currencyCode
inputFields.description: The three-letter currency code defined in ISO 4217.

inputFields.name: units
inputFields.description: The whole units of the amount. For example if `currencyCode` is `"USD"`, then 1 unit is one US dollar.

inputFields.name: nanos
inputFields.description: Number of nano (10^-9) units of the amount. The value must be between -999,999,999 and +999,999,999 inclusive. If `units` is positive, `nanos` must be positive or zero. If `units` is zero, `nanos` can be positive, zero, or negative. If `units` is negative, `nanos` must be negative or zero. For example $-1.75 is represented as `units`=-1 and `nanos`=-750,000,000.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1ActiveLearningConfig_Input
types.description: Parameters that configure the active learning pipeline. Active learning will label the data incrementally by several iterations. For every iteration, it will select a batch of data based on the sampling strategy.

inputFields.name: maxDataItemCount
inputFields.description: Max number of human labeled DataItems.

inputFields.name: maxDataItemPercentage
inputFields.description: Max percent of total DataItems for human labeling.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1SampleConfig_Input
types.description: Active learning data sampling config. For every active learning labeling iteration, it will select a batch of data based on the sampling strategy.

inputFields.name: initialBatchSamplePercentage
inputFields.description: The percentage of data needed to be labeled in the first batch.

inputFields.name: followingBatchSamplePercentage
inputFields.description: The percentage of data needed to be labeled in each following batch (except the first batch).

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1TrainingConfig_Input
types.description: CMLE training config. For every active learning labeling iteration, system will train a machine learning model on CMLE. The trained model will be used by data sampling algorithm to select DataItems.

inputFields.name: timeoutTrainingMilliHours
inputFields.description: The timeout hours for the CMLE training job, expressed in milli hours i.e. 1,000 value in this field means 1 hour.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1HyperparameterTuningJob_Input
types.description: Represents a HyperparameterTuningJob. A HyperparameterTuningJob has a Study specification and multiple CustomJobs with identical CustomJob specification.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description: Output only. Resource name of the HyperparameterTuningJob.

inputFields.name: displayName
inputFields.description: Required. The display name of the HyperparameterTuningJob. The name can be up to 128 characters long and can consist of any UTF-8 characters.

inputFields.name: maxTrialCount
inputFields.description: Required. The desired total number of Trials.

inputFields.name: parallelTrialCount
inputFields.description: Required. The desired number of Trials to run in parallel.

inputFields.name: maxFailedTrialCount
inputFields.description: The number of failed Trials that need to be seen before failing the HyperparameterTuningJob. If set to 0, Vertex AI decides how many Trials must fail before the whole job fails.

inputFields.name: trials
inputFields.description: Output only. Trials of the HyperparameterTuningJob.

inputFields.name: createTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Time when the HyperparameterTuningJob was created.

inputFields.name: startTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Time when the HyperparameterTuningJob for the first time entered the `JOB_STATE_RUNNING` state.

inputFields.name: endTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Time when the HyperparameterTuningJob entered any of the following states: `JOB_STATE_SUCCEEDED`, `JOB_STATE_FAILED`, `JOB_STATE_CANCELLED`.

inputFields.name: updateTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Time when the HyperparameterTuningJob was most recently updated.

inputFields.name: labels
inputFields.description: The labels with user-defined metadata to organize HyperparameterTuningJobs. Label keys and values can be no longer than 64 characters (Unicode codepoints), can only contain lowercase letters, numeric characters, underscores and dashes. International characters are allowed. See https://goo.gl/xmQnxf for more information and examples of labels.

inputFields.name: satisfiesPzs
inputFields.description: Output only. Reserved for future use.

inputFields.name: satisfiesPzi
inputFields.description: Output only. Reserved for future use.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1StudySpec_Input
types.description: Represents specification of a Study.

inputFields.name: metrics
inputFields.description: Required. Metric specs for the Study.

inputFields.name: parameters
inputFields.description: Required. The set of parameters to tune.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1StudySpecDecayCurveAutomatedStoppingSpec_Input
types.description: The decay curve automated stopping rule builds a Gaussian Process Regressor to predict the final objective value of a Trial based on the already completed Trials and the intermediate measurements of the current Trial. Early stopping is requested for the current Trial if there is very low probability to exceed the optimal value found so far.

inputFields.name: useElapsedDuration
inputFields.description: True if Measurement.elapsed_duration is used as the x-axis of each Trials Decay Curve. Otherwise, Measurement.step_count will be used as the x-axis.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1StudySpecMedianAutomatedStoppingSpec_Input
types.description: The median automated stopping rule stops a pending Trial if the Trial's best objective_value is strictly below the median 'performance' of all completed Trials reported up to the Trial's last measurement. Currently, 'performance' refers to the running average of the objective values reported by the Trial in each measurement.

inputFields.name: useElapsedDuration
inputFields.description: True if median automated stopping rule applies on Measurement.elapsed_duration. It means that elapsed_duration field of latest measurement of current Trial is used to compute median objective value for each completed Trials.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1StudySpecConvexAutomatedStoppingSpec_Input
types.description: Configuration for ConvexAutomatedStoppingSpec. When there are enough completed trials (configured by min_measurement_count), for pending trials with enough measurements and steps, the policy first computes an overestimate of the objective value at max_num_steps according to the slope of the incomplete objective value curve. No prediction can be made if the curve is completely flat. If the overestimation is worse than the best objective value of the completed trials, this pending trial will be early-stopped, but a last measurement will be added to the pending trial with max_num_steps and predicted objective value from the autoregression model.

inputFields.name: maxStepCount
inputFields.description: Steps used in predicting the final objective for early stopped trials. In general, it's set to be the same as the defined steps in training / tuning. If not defined, it will learn it from the completed trials. When use_steps is false, this field is set to the maximum elapsed seconds.

inputFields.name: minStepCount
inputFields.description: Minimum number of steps for a trial to complete. Trials which do not have a measurement with step_count > min_step_count won't be considered for early stopping. It's ok to set it to 0, and a trial can be early stopped at any stage. By default, min_step_count is set to be one-tenth of the max_step_count. When use_elapsed_duration is true, this field is set to the minimum elapsed seconds.

inputFields.name: minMeasurementCount
inputFields.description: The minimal number of measurements in a Trial. Early-stopping checks will not trigger if less than min_measurement_count+1 completed trials or pending trials with less than min_measurement_count measurements. If not defined, the default value is 5.

inputFields.name: learningRateParameterName
inputFields.description: The hyper-parameter name used in the tuning job that stands for learning rate. Leave it blank if learning rate is not in a parameter in tuning. The learning_rate is used to estimate the objective value of the ongoing trial.

inputFields.name: useElapsedDuration
inputFields.description: This bool determines whether or not the rule is applied based on elapsed_secs or steps. If use_elapsed_duration==false, the early stopping decision is made according to the predicted objective values according to the target steps. If use_elapsed_duration==true, elapsed_secs is used instead of steps. Also, in this case, the parameters max_num_steps and min_num_steps are overloaded to contain max_elapsed_seconds and min_elapsed_seconds.

inputFields.name: updateAllStoppedTrials
inputFields.description: ConvexAutomatedStoppingSpec by default only updates the trials that needs to be early stopped using a newly trained auto-regressive model. When this flag is set to True, all stopped trials from the beginning are potentially updated in terms of their `final_measurement`. Also, note that the training logic of autoregressive models is different in this case. Enabling this option has shown better results and this may be the default option in the future.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1StudySpecMetricSpec_Input
types.description: Represents a metric to optimize.

inputFields.name: metricId
inputFields.description: Required. The ID of the metric. Must not contain whitespaces and must be unique amongst all MetricSpecs.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1StudySpecMetricSpecSafetyMetricConfig_Input
types.description: Used in safe optimization to specify threshold levels and risk tolerance.

inputFields.name: safetyThreshold
inputFields.description: Safety threshold (boundary value between safe and unsafe). NOTE that if you leave SafetyMetricConfig unset, a default value of 0 will be used.

inputFields.name: desiredMinSafeTrialsFraction
inputFields.description: Desired minimum fraction of safe trials (over total number of trials) that should be targeted by the algorithm at any time during the study (best effort). This should be between 0.0 and 1.0 and a value of 0.0 means that there is no minimum and an algorithm proceeds without targeting any specific fraction. A value of 1.0 means that the algorithm attempts to only Suggest safe Trials.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1StudySpecParameterSpec_Input
types.description: Represents a single parameter to optimize.

inputFields.name: parameterId
inputFields.description: Required. The ID of the parameter. Must not contain whitespaces and must be unique amongst all ParameterSpecs.

inputFields.name: conditionalParameterSpecs
inputFields.description: A conditional parameter node is active if the parameter's value matches the conditional node's parent_value_condition. If two items in conditional_parameter_specs have the same name, they must have disjoint parent_value_condition.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1StudySpecParameterSpecDoubleValueSpec_Input
types.description: Value specification for a parameter in `DOUBLE` type.

inputFields.name: minValue
inputFields.description: Required. Inclusive minimum value of the parameter.

inputFields.name: maxValue
inputFields.description: Required. Inclusive maximum value of the parameter.

inputFields.name: defaultValue
inputFields.description: A default value for a `DOUBLE` parameter that is assumed to be a relatively good starting point. Unset value signals that there is no offered starting point. Currently only supported by the Vertex AI Vizier service. Not supported by HyperparameterTuningJob or TrainingPipeline.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1StudySpecParameterSpecIntegerValueSpec_Input
types.description: Value specification for a parameter in `INTEGER` type.

inputFields.name: minValue
inputFields.description: Required. Inclusive minimum value of the parameter.

inputFields.name: maxValue
inputFields.description: Required. Inclusive maximum value of the parameter.

inputFields.name: defaultValue
inputFields.description: A default value for an `INTEGER` parameter that is assumed to be a relatively good starting point. Unset value signals that there is no offered starting point. Currently only supported by the Vertex AI Vizier service. Not supported by HyperparameterTuningJob or TrainingPipeline.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1StudySpecParameterSpecCategoricalValueSpec_Input
types.description: Value specification for a parameter in `CATEGORICAL` type.

inputFields.name: values
inputFields.description: Required. The list of possible categories.

inputFields.name: defaultValue
inputFields.description: A default value for a `CATEGORICAL` parameter that is assumed to be a relatively good starting point. Unset value signals that there is no offered starting point. Currently only supported by the Vertex AI Vizier service. Not supported by HyperparameterTuningJob or TrainingPipeline.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1StudySpecParameterSpecDiscreteValueSpec_Input
types.description: Value specification for a parameter in `DISCRETE` type.

inputFields.name: values
inputFields.description: Required. A list of possible values. The list should be in increasing order and at least 1e-10 apart. For instance, this parameter might have possible settings of 1.5, 2.5, and 4.0. This list should not contain more than 1,000 values.

inputFields.name: defaultValue
inputFields.description: A default value for a `DISCRETE` parameter that is assumed to be a relatively good starting point. Unset value signals that there is no offered starting point. It automatically rounds to the nearest feasible discrete point. Currently only supported by the Vertex AI Vizier service. Not supported by HyperparameterTuningJob or TrainingPipeline.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1StudySpecParameterSpecConditionalParameterSpec_Input
types.description: Represents a parameter spec with condition from its parent parameter.

inputFields.name: parameterSpec
inputFields.description: Represents a single parameter to optimize.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1StudySpecParameterSpecConditionalParameterSpecDiscreteValueCondition_Input
types.description: Represents the spec to match discrete values from parent parameter.

inputFields.name: values
inputFields.description: Required. Matches values of the parent parameter of 'DISCRETE' type. All values must exist in `discrete_value_spec` of parent parameter. The Epsilon of the value matching is 1e-10.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1StudySpecParameterSpecConditionalParameterSpecIntValueCondition_Input
types.description: Represents the spec to match integer values from parent parameter.

inputFields.name: values
inputFields.description: Required. Matches values of the parent parameter of 'INTEGER' type. All values must lie in `integer_value_spec` of parent parameter.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1StudySpecParameterSpecConditionalParameterSpecCategoricalValueCondition_Input
types.description: Represents the spec to match categorical values from parent parameter.

inputFields.name: values
inputFields.description: Required. Matches values of the parent parameter of 'CATEGORICAL' type. All values must exist in `categorical_value_spec` of parent parameter.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1StudySpecStudyStoppingConfig_Input
types.description: The configuration (stopping conditions) for automated stopping of a Study. Conditions include trial budgets, time budgets, and convergence detection.

inputFields.name: shouldStopAsap
inputFields.description: If true, a Study enters STOPPING_ASAP whenever it would normally enters STOPPING state. The bottom line is: set to true if you want to interrupt on-going evaluations of Trials as soon as the study stopping condition is met. (Please see Study.State documentation for the source of truth).

inputFields.name: minNumTrials
inputFields.description: If there are fewer than this many COMPLETED trials, do not stop the study.

inputFields.name: maxNumTrials
inputFields.description: If there are more than this many trials, stop the study.

inputFields.name: maxNumTrialsNoProgress
inputFields.description: If the objective value has not improved for this many consecutive trials, stop the study. WARNING: Effective only for single-objective studies.

inputFields.name: maxDurationNoProgress
inputFields.description: If the objective value has not improved for this much time, stop the study. WARNING: Effective only for single-objective studies.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1StudyTimeConstraint_Input
types.description: Time-based Constraint for Study

inputFields.name: maxDuration
inputFields.description: Counts the wallclock time passed since the creation of this Study.

inputFields.name: endTime
inputFields.description: Compares the wallclock time to this time. Must use UTC timezone.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1Trial_Input
types.description: A message representing a Trial. A Trial contains a unique set of Parameters that has been or will be evaluated, along with the objective metrics got by running the Trial.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description: Output only. Resource name of the Trial assigned by the service.

inputFields.name: id
inputFields.description: Output only. The identifier of the Trial assigned by the service.

inputFields.name: parameters
inputFields.description: Output only. The parameters of the Trial.

inputFields.name: measurements
inputFields.description: Output only. A list of measurements that are strictly lexicographically ordered by their induced tuples (steps, elapsed_duration). These are used for early stopping computations.

inputFields.name: startTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Time when the Trial was started.

inputFields.name: endTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Time when the Trial's status changed to `SUCCEEDED` or `INFEASIBLE`.

inputFields.name: clientId
inputFields.description: Output only. The identifier of the client that originally requested this Trial. Each client is identified by a unique client_id. When a client asks for a suggestion, Vertex AI Vizier will assign it a Trial. The client should evaluate the Trial, complete it, and report back to Vertex AI Vizier. If suggestion is asked again by same client_id before the Trial is completed, the same Trial will be returned. Multiple clients with different client_ids can ask for suggestions simultaneously, each of them will get their own Trial.

inputFields.name: infeasibleReason
inputFields.description: Output only. A human readable string describing why the Trial is infeasible. This is set only if Trial state is `INFEASIBLE`.

inputFields.name: customJob
inputFields.description: Output only. The CustomJob name linked to the Trial. It's set for a HyperparameterTuningJob's Trial.

inputFields.name: webAccessUris
inputFields.description: Output only. URIs for accessing [interactive shells](https://cloud.google.com/vertex-ai/docs/training/monitor-debug-interactive-shell) (one URI for each training node). Only available if this trial is part of a HyperparameterTuningJob and the job's trial_job_spec.enable_web_access field is `true`. The keys are names of each node used for the trial; for example, `workerpool0-0` for the primary node, `workerpool1-0` for the first node in the second worker pool, and `workerpool1-1` for the second node in the second worker pool. The values are the URIs for each node's interactive shell.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1TrialParameter_Input
types.description: A message representing a parameter to be tuned.

inputFields.name: parameterId
inputFields.description: Output only. The ID of the parameter. The parameter should be defined in StudySpec's Parameters.

inputFields.name: value
inputFields.description: Output only. The value of the parameter. `number_value` will be set if a parameter defined in StudySpec is in type 'INTEGER', 'DOUBLE' or 'DISCRETE'. `string_value` will be set if a parameter defined in StudySpec is in type 'CATEGORICAL'.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1Measurement_Input
types.description: A message representing a Measurement of a Trial. A Measurement contains the Metrics got by executing a Trial using suggested hyperparameter values.

inputFields.name: elapsedDuration
inputFields.description: Output only. Time that the Trial has been running at the point of this Measurement.

inputFields.name: stepCount
inputFields.description: Output only. The number of steps the machine learning model has been trained for. Must be non-negative.

inputFields.name: metrics
inputFields.description: Output only. A list of metrics got by evaluating the objective functions using suggested Parameter values.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1MeasurementMetric_Input
types.description: A message representing a metric in the measurement.

inputFields.name: metricId
inputFields.description: Output only. The ID of the Metric. The Metric should be defined in StudySpec's Metrics.

inputFields.name: value
inputFields.description: Output only. The value for this metric.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1NasJob_Input
types.description: Represents a Neural Architecture Search (NAS) job.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description: Output only. Resource name of the NasJob.

inputFields.name: displayName
inputFields.description: Required. The display name of the NasJob. The name can be up to 128 characters long and can consist of any UTF-8 characters.

inputFields.name: createTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Time when the NasJob was created.

inputFields.name: startTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Time when the NasJob for the first time entered the `JOB_STATE_RUNNING` state.

inputFields.name: endTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Time when the NasJob entered any of the following states: `JOB_STATE_SUCCEEDED`, `JOB_STATE_FAILED`, `JOB_STATE_CANCELLED`.

inputFields.name: updateTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Time when the NasJob was most recently updated.

inputFields.name: labels
inputFields.description: The labels with user-defined metadata to organize NasJobs. Label keys and values can be no longer than 64 characters (Unicode codepoints), can only contain lowercase letters, numeric characters, underscores and dashes. International characters are allowed. See https://goo.gl/xmQnxf for more information and examples of labels.

inputFields.name: enableRestrictedImageTraining
inputFields.description: Optional. Enable a separation of Custom model training and restricted image training for tenant project.

inputFields.name: satisfiesPzs
inputFields.description: Output only. Reserved for future use.

inputFields.name: satisfiesPzi
inputFields.description: Output only. Reserved for future use.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1NasJobSpec_Input
types.description: Represents the spec of a NasJob.

inputFields.name: resumeNasJobId
inputFields.description: The ID of the existing NasJob in the same Project and Location which will be used to resume search. search_space_spec and nas_algorithm_spec are obtained from previous NasJob hence should not provide them again for this NasJob.

inputFields.name: searchSpaceSpec
inputFields.description: It defines the search space for Neural Architecture Search (NAS).

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1NasJobSpecMultiTrialAlgorithmSpec_Input
types.description: The spec of multi-trial Neural Architecture Search (NAS).

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1NasJobSpecMultiTrialAlgorithmSpecMetricSpec_Input
types.description: Represents a metric to optimize.

inputFields.name: metricId
inputFields.description: Required. The ID of the metric. Must not contain whitespaces.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1NasJobSpecMultiTrialAlgorithmSpecSearchTrialSpec_Input
types.description: Represent spec for search trials.

inputFields.name: maxTrialCount
inputFields.description: Required. The maximum number of Neural Architecture Search (NAS) trials to run.

inputFields.name: maxParallelTrialCount
inputFields.description: Required. The maximum number of trials to run in parallel.

inputFields.name: maxFailedTrialCount
inputFields.description: The number of failed trials that need to be seen before failing the NasJob. If set to 0, Vertex AI decides how many trials must fail before the whole job fails.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1NasJobSpecMultiTrialAlgorithmSpecTrainTrialSpec_Input
types.description: Represent spec for train trials.

inputFields.name: maxParallelTrialCount
inputFields.description: Required. The maximum number of trials to run in parallel.

inputFields.name: frequency
inputFields.description: Required. Frequency of search trials to start train stage. Top N [TrainTrialSpec.max_parallel_trial_count] search trials will be trained for every M [TrainTrialSpec.frequency] trials searched.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1NasJobOutput_Input
types.description: Represents a uCAIP NasJob output.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1NasJobOutputMultiTrialJobOutput_Input
types.description: The output of a multi-trial Neural Architecture Search (NAS) jobs.

inputFields.name: searchTrials
inputFields.description: Output only. List of NasTrials that were started as part of search stage.

inputFields.name: trainTrials
inputFields.description: Output only. List of NasTrials that were started as part of train stage.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1NasTrial_Input
types.description: Represents a uCAIP NasJob trial.

inputFields.name: id
inputFields.description: Output only. The identifier of the NasTrial assigned by the service.

inputFields.name: startTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Time when the NasTrial was started.

inputFields.name: endTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Time when the NasTrial's status changed to `SUCCEEDED` or `INFEASIBLE`.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1BatchPredictionJob_Input
types.description: A job that uses a Model to produce predictions on multiple input instances. If predictions for significant portion of the instances fail, the job may finish without attempting predictions for all remaining instances.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description: Output only. Resource name of the BatchPredictionJob.

inputFields.name: displayName
inputFields.description: Required. The user-defined name of this BatchPredictionJob.

inputFields.name: model
inputFields.description: The name of the Model resource that produces the predictions via this job, must share the same ancestor Location. Starting this job has no impact on any existing deployments of the Model and their resources. Exactly one of model, unmanaged_container_model, or endpoint must be set. The model resource name may contain version id or version alias to specify the version. Example: `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/models/{model}@2` or `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/models/{model}@golden` if no version is specified, the default version will be deployed. The model resource could also be a publisher model. Example: `publishers/{publisher}/models/{model}` or `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/publishers/{publisher}/models/{model}`

inputFields.name: modelVersionId
inputFields.description: Output only. The version ID of the Model that produces the predictions via this job.

inputFields.name: modelParameters
inputFields.description: The parameters that govern the predictions. The schema of the parameters may be specified via the Model's PredictSchemata's parameters_schema_uri.

inputFields.name: serviceAccount
inputFields.description: The service account that the DeployedModel's container runs as. If not specified, a system generated one will be used, which has minimal permissions and the custom container, if used, may not have enough permission to access other Google Cloud resources. Users deploying the Model must have the `iam.serviceAccounts.actAs` permission on this service account.

inputFields.name: generateExplanation
inputFields.description: Generate explanation with the batch prediction results. When set to `true`, the batch prediction output changes based on the `predictions_format` field of the BatchPredictionJob.output_config object: * `bigquery`: output includes a column named `explanation`. The value is a struct that conforms to the Explanation object. * `jsonl`: The JSON objects on each line include an additional entry keyed `explanation`. The value of the entry is a JSON object that conforms to the Explanation object. * `csv`: Generating explanations for CSV format is not supported. If this field is set to true, either the Model.explanation_spec or explanation_spec must be populated.

inputFields.name: partialFailures
inputFields.description: Output only. Partial failures encountered. For example, single files that can't be read. This field never exceeds 20 entries. Status details fields contain standard Google Cloud error details.

inputFields.name: createTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Time when the BatchPredictionJob was created.

inputFields.name: startTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Time when the BatchPredictionJob for the first time entered the `JOB_STATE_RUNNING` state.

inputFields.name: endTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Time when the BatchPredictionJob entered any of the following states: `JOB_STATE_SUCCEEDED`, `JOB_STATE_FAILED`, `JOB_STATE_CANCELLED`.

inputFields.name: updateTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Time when the BatchPredictionJob was most recently updated.

inputFields.name: labels
inputFields.description: The labels with user-defined metadata to organize BatchPredictionJobs. Label keys and values can be no longer than 64 characters (Unicode codepoints), can only contain lowercase letters, numeric characters, underscores and dashes. International characters are allowed. See https://goo.gl/xmQnxf for more information and examples of labels.

inputFields.name: disableContainerLogging
inputFields.description: For custom-trained Models and AutoML Tabular Models, the container of the DeployedModel instances will send `stderr` and `stdout` streams to Cloud Logging by default. Please note that the logs incur cost, which are subject to [Cloud Logging pricing](https://cloud.google.com/logging/pricing). User can disable container logging by setting this flag to true.

inputFields.name: satisfiesPzs
inputFields.description: Output only. Reserved for future use.

inputFields.name: satisfiesPzi
inputFields.description: Output only. Reserved for future use.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1UnmanagedContainerModel_Input
types.description: Contains model information necessary to perform batch prediction without requiring a full model import.

inputFields.name: artifactUri
inputFields.description: The path to the directory containing the Model artifact and any of its supporting files.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1BatchPredictionJobInputConfig_Input
types.description: Configures the input to BatchPredictionJob. See Model.supported_input_storage_formats for Model's supported input formats, and how instances should be expressed via any of them.

inputFields.name: instancesFormat
inputFields.description: Required. The format in which instances are given, must be one of the Model's supported_input_storage_formats.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1VertexMultimodalDatasetSource_Input
types.description: The Vertex Multimodal Dataset for the input content.

inputFields.name: datasetName
inputFields.description: Required. The resource name of the Vertex Dataset. Format: `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/datasets/{dataset}`

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1BatchPredictionJobInstanceConfig_Input
types.description: Configuration defining how to transform batch prediction input instances to the instances that the Model accepts.

inputFields.name: instanceType
inputFields.description: The format of the instance that the Model accepts. Vertex AI will convert compatible batch prediction input instance formats to the specified format. Supported values are: * `object`: Each input is converted to JSON object format. * For `bigquery`, each row is converted to an object. * For `jsonl`, each line of the JSONL input must be an object. * Does not apply to `csv`, `file-list`, `tf-record`, or `tf-record-gzip`. * `array`: Each input is converted to JSON array format. * For `bigquery`, each row is converted to an array. The order of columns is determined by the BigQuery column order, unless included_fields is populated. included_fields must be populated for specifying field orders. * For `jsonl`, if each line of the JSONL input is an object, included_fields must be populated for specifying field orders. * Does not apply to `csv`, `file-list`, `tf-record`, or `tf-record-gzip`. If not specified, Vertex AI converts the batch prediction input as follows: * For `bigquery` and `csv`, the behavior is the same as `array`. The order of columns is the same as defined in the file or table, unless included_fields is populated. * For `jsonl`, the prediction instance format is determined by each line of the input. * For `tf-record`/`tf-record-gzip`, each record will be converted to an object in the format of `{"b64": }`, where `` is the Base64-encoded string of the content of the record. * For `file-list`, each file in the list will be converted to an object in the format of `{"b64": }`, where `` is the Base64-encoded string of the content of the file.

inputFields.name: keyField
inputFields.description: The name of the field that is considered as a key. The values identified by the key field is not included in the transformed instances that is sent to the Model. This is similar to specifying this name of the field in excluded_fields. In addition, the batch prediction output will not include the instances. Instead the output will only include the value of the key field, in a field named `key` in the output: * For `jsonl` output format, the output will have a `key` field instead of the `instance` field. * For `csv`/`bigquery` output format, the output will have have a `key` column instead of the instance feature columns. The input must be JSONL with objects at each line, CSV, BigQuery or TfRecord.

inputFields.name: includedFields
inputFields.description: Fields that will be included in the prediction instance that is sent to the Model. If instance_type is `array`, the order of field names in included_fields also determines the order of the values in the array. When included_fields is populated, excluded_fields must be empty. The input must be JSONL with objects at each line, BigQuery or TfRecord.

inputFields.name: excludedFields
inputFields.description: Fields that will be excluded in the prediction instance that is sent to the Model. Excluded will be attached to the batch prediction output if key_field is not specified. When excluded_fields is populated, included_fields must be empty. The input must be JSONL with objects at each line, BigQuery or TfRecord.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1BatchPredictionJobOutputConfig_Input
types.description: Configures the output of BatchPredictionJob. See Model.supported_output_storage_formats for supported output formats, and how predictions are expressed via any of them.

inputFields.name: predictionsFormat
inputFields.description: Required. The format in which Vertex AI gives the predictions, must be one of the Model's supported_output_storage_formats.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1VertexMultimodalDatasetDestination_Input
types.description: The details for a Vertex Multimodal Dataset output.

inputFields.name: displayName
inputFields.description: Optional. Display name of the output dataset.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1BatchDedicatedResources_Input
types.description: A description of resources that are used for performing batch operations, are dedicated to a Model, and need manual configuration.

inputFields.name: startingReplicaCount
inputFields.description: Immutable. The number of machine replicas used at the start of the batch operation. If not set, Vertex AI decides starting number, not greater than max_replica_count

inputFields.name: maxReplicaCount
inputFields.description: Immutable. The maximum number of machine replicas the batch operation may be scaled to. The default value is 10.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1ManualBatchTuningParameters_Input
types.description: Manual batch tuning parameters.

inputFields.name: batchSize
inputFields.description: Immutable. The number of the records (e.g. instances) of the operation given in each batch to a machine replica. Machine type, and size of a single record should be considered when setting this parameter, higher value speeds up the batch operation's execution, but too high value will result in a whole batch not fitting in a machine's memory, and the whole operation will fail. The default value is 64.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1BatchPredictionJobOutputInfo_Input
types.description: Further describes this job's output. Supplements output_config.

inputFields.name: gcsOutputDirectory
inputFields.description: Output only. The full path of the Cloud Storage directory created, into which the prediction output is written.

inputFields.name: bigqueryOutputDataset
inputFields.description: Output only. The path of the BigQuery dataset created, in `bq://projectId.bqDatasetId` format, into which the prediction output is written.

inputFields.name: vertexMultimodalDatasetName
inputFields.description: Output only. The resource name of the Vertex Managed Dataset created, into which the prediction output is written. Format: `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/datasets/{dataset}`

inputFields.name: bigqueryOutputTable
inputFields.description: Output only. The name of the BigQuery table created, in `predictions_` format, into which the prediction output is written. Can be used by UI to generate the BigQuery output path, for example.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1ResourcesConsumed_Input
types.description: Statistics information about resource consumption.

inputFields.name: replicaHours
inputFields.description: Output only. The number of replica hours used. Note that many replicas may run in parallel, and additionally any given work may be queued for some time. Therefore this value is not strictly related to wall time.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1CompletionStats_Input
types.description: Success and error statistics of processing multiple entities (for example, DataItems or structured data rows) in batch.

inputFields.name: successfulCount
inputFields.description: Output only. The number of entities that had been processed successfully.

inputFields.name: failedCount
inputFields.description: Output only. The number of entities for which any error was encountered.

inputFields.name: incompleteCount
inputFields.description: Output only. In cases when enough errors are encountered a job, pipeline, or operation may be failed as a whole. Below is the number of entities for which the processing had not been finished (either in successful or failed state). Set to -1 if the number is unknown (for example, the operation failed before the total entity number could be collected).

inputFields.name: successfulForecastPointCount
inputFields.description: Output only. The number of the successful forecast points that are generated by the forecasting model. This is ONLY used by the forecasting batch prediction.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1ModelDeploymentMonitoringJob_Input
types.description: Represents a job that runs periodically to monitor the deployed models in an endpoint. It will analyze the logged training & prediction data to detect any abnormal behaviors.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description: Output only. Resource name of a ModelDeploymentMonitoringJob.

inputFields.name: displayName
inputFields.description: Required. The user-defined name of the ModelDeploymentMonitoringJob. The name can be up to 128 characters long and can consist of any UTF-8 characters. Display name of a ModelDeploymentMonitoringJob.

inputFields.name: endpoint
inputFields.description: Required. Endpoint resource name. Format: `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/endpoints/{endpoint}`

inputFields.name: modelDeploymentMonitoringObjectiveConfigs
inputFields.description: Required. The config for monitoring objectives. This is a per DeployedModel config. Each DeployedModel needs to be configured separately.

inputFields.name: predictInstanceSchemaUri
inputFields.description: YAML schema file uri describing the format of a single instance, which are given to format this Endpoint's prediction (and explanation). If not set, we will generate predict schema from collected predict requests.

inputFields.name: samplePredictInstance
inputFields.description: Sample Predict instance, same format as PredictRequest.instances, this can be set as a replacement of ModelDeploymentMonitoringJob.predict_instance_schema_uri. If not set, we will generate predict schema from collected predict requests.

inputFields.name: analysisInstanceSchemaUri
inputFields.description: YAML schema file uri describing the format of a single instance that you want Tensorflow Data Validation (TFDV) to analyze. If this field is empty, all the feature data types are inferred from predict_instance_schema_uri, meaning that TFDV will use the data in the exact format(data type) as prediction request/response. If there are any data type differences between predict instance and TFDV instance, this field can be used to override the schema. For models trained with Vertex AI, this field must be set as all the fields in predict instance formatted as string.

inputFields.name: bigqueryTables
inputFields.description: Output only. The created bigquery tables for the job under customer project. Customer could do their own query & analysis. There could be 4 log tables in maximum: 1. Training data logging predict request/response 2. Serving data logging predict request/response

inputFields.name: logTtl
inputFields.description: The TTL of BigQuery tables in user projects which stores logs. A day is the basic unit of the TTL and we take the ceil of TTL/86400(a day). e.g. { second: 3600} indicates ttl = 1 day.

inputFields.name: labels
inputFields.description: The labels with user-defined metadata to organize your ModelDeploymentMonitoringJob. Label keys and values can be no longer than 64 characters (Unicode codepoints), can only contain lowercase letters, numeric characters, underscores and dashes. International characters are allowed. See https://goo.gl/xmQnxf for more information and examples of labels.

inputFields.name: createTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Timestamp when this ModelDeploymentMonitoringJob was created.

inputFields.name: updateTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Timestamp when this ModelDeploymentMonitoringJob was updated most recently.

inputFields.name: nextScheduleTime
inputFields.description: Output only. Timestamp when this monitoring pipeline will be scheduled to run for the next round.

inputFields.name: enableMonitoringPipelineLogs
inputFields.description: If true, the scheduled monitoring pipeline logs are sent to Google Cloud Logging, including pipeline status and anomalies detected. Please note the logs incur cost, which are subject to [Cloud Logging pricing](https://cloud.google.com/logging#pricing).

inputFields.name: satisfiesPzs
inputFields.description: Output only. Reserved for future use.

inputFields.name: satisfiesPzi
inputFields.description: Output only. Reserved for future use.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1ModelDeploymentMonitoringJobLatestMonitoringPipelineMetadata_Input
types.description: All metadata of most recent monitoring pipelines.

inputFields.name: runTime
inputFields.description: The time that most recent monitoring pipelines that is related to this run.

types.description: ModelDeploymentMonitoringObjectiveConfig contains the pair of deployed_model_id to ModelMonitoringObjectiveConfig.

inputFields.name: deployedModelId
inputFields.description: The DeployedModel ID of the objective config.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1ModelMonitoringObjectiveConfig_Input
types.description: The objective configuration for model monitoring, including the information needed to detect anomalies for one particular model.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1ModelMonitoringObjectiveConfigTrainingDataset_Input
types.description: Training Dataset information.

inputFields.name: dataset
inputFields.description: The resource name of the Dataset used to train this Model.

inputFields.name: dataFormat
inputFields.description: Data format of the dataset, only applicable if the input is from Google Cloud Storage. The possible formats are: "tf-record" The source file is a TFRecord file. "csv" The source file is a CSV file. "jsonl" The source file is a JSONL file.

inputFields.name: targetField
inputFields.description: The target field name the model is to predict. This field will be excluded when doing Predict and (or) Explain for the training data.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1SamplingStrategy_Input
types.description: Sampling Strategy for logging, can be for both training and prediction dataset.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1SamplingStrategyRandomSampleConfig_Input
types.description: Requests are randomly selected.

inputFields.name: sampleRate
inputFields.description: Sample rate (0, 1]

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1ModelMonitoringObjectiveConfigTrainingPredictionSkewDetectionConfig_Input
types.description: The config for Training & Prediction data skew detection. It specifies the training dataset sources and the skew detection parameters.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1ThresholdConfig_Input3
types.description: The config for feature monitoring threshold.

inputFields.name: value
inputFields.description: Specify a threshold value that can trigger the alert. If this threshold config is for feature distribution distance: 1. For categorical feature, the distribution distance is calculated by L-inifinity norm. 2. For numerical feature, the distribution distance is calculated by Jensen–Shannon divergence. Each feature must have a non-zero threshold if they need to be monitored. Otherwise no alert will be triggered for that feature.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1ModelMonitoringObjectiveConfigPredictionDriftDetectionConfig_Input
types.description: The config for Prediction data drift detection.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1ModelMonitoringObjectiveConfigExplanationConfig_Input
types.description: The config for integrating with Vertex Explainable AI. Only applicable if the Model has explanation_spec populated.

inputFields.name: enableFeatureAttributes
inputFields.description: If want to analyze the Vertex Explainable AI feature attribute scores or not. If set to true, Vertex AI will log the feature attributions from explain response and do the skew/drift detection for them.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1ModelMonitoringObjectiveConfigExplanationConfigExplanationBaseline_Input
types.description: Output from BatchPredictionJob for Model Monitoring baseline dataset, which can be used to generate baseline attribution scores.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1ModelDeploymentMonitoringScheduleConfig_Input
types.description: The config for scheduling monitoring job.

inputFields.name: monitorInterval
inputFields.description: Required. The model monitoring job scheduling interval. It will be rounded up to next full hour. This defines how often the monitoring jobs are triggered.

inputFields.name: monitorWindow
inputFields.description: The time window of the prediction data being included in each prediction dataset. This window specifies how long the data should be collected from historical model results for each run. If not set, ModelDeploymentMonitoringScheduleConfig.monitor_interval will be used. e.g. If currently the cutoff time is 2022-01-08 14:30:00 and the monitor_window is set to be 3600, then data from 2022-01-08 13:30:00 to 2022-01-08 14:30:00 will be retrieved and aggregated to calculate the monitoring statistics.

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1ModelMonitoringAlertConfig_Input
types.description: The alert config for model monitoring.

inputFields.name: enableLogging
inputFields.description: Dump the anomalies to Cloud Logging. The anomalies will be put to json payload encoded from proto ModelMonitoringStatsAnomalies. This can be further synced to Pub/Sub or any other services supported by Cloud Logging.

inputFields.name: notificationChannels
inputFields.description: Resource names of the NotificationChannels to send alert. Must be of the format `projects//notificationChannels/`

types.name: GoogleCloudAiplatformV1ModelMonitoringAlertConfigEmailAlertConfig_Input
types.description: The config for email alert.

inputFields.name: userEmails
inputFields.description: The email addresses to send the alert.

inputFields.description: The created BigQuery table to store logs. Customer could do their own query & analysis. Format: `bq://.model_deployment_monitoring_._`

inputFields.name: requestResponseLoggingSchemaVersion
inputFields.description: Output only. The schema version of the request/response logging BigQuery table. Default to v1 if unset.
